original_syllogism: Ni kesi kwamba hakuna mmea ni kitu hai. Kila jani moja limetengenezwa na plastiki iliyokufa. Bustani zote ni makaburi ya miamba. Hakuna ua ambao umewahi maua. Mizizi kadhaa hukua angani. Ni ukweli kwamba maji huua mimea yote. Kati ya vitu ambavyo ni mimea, zingine ni maua. Hii inathibitisha kuwa angalau maua mengine sio vitu hai.
english_translated_syllogism: It is the case that no plant is a living thing. Every single leaf is made of dead plastic. All gardens are rock tombs. No flower has ever bloomed. Several roots grow in the air. It is a fact that water kills all plants. Among the things that are plants, some are flowers. This proves that at least some flowers are not living things.

original_syllogism: যে কোনো টিকটিকি একটি সরীসৃপ।প্রতিটি কুকুর একটি স্তন্যপায়ী প্রাণী।এটা সত্য যে কোন সরীসৃপই স্তন্যপায়ী নয়।কিছু প্রাণী স্তন্যপায়ী নয়।এটি এমন যে সমস্ত কচ্ছপই সরীসৃপ।এমন কোন ব্যাঙ নেই যেগুলো স্তন্যপায়ী প্রাণী।কিছু সাপ আছে যারা সরীসৃপ।এটি অনুসরণ করে যে কিছু স্তন্যপায়ী প্রাণী সাপ নয়।
english_translated_syllogism: Every lizard is a reptile. Every dog ​​is a mammal. It is true that no reptile is a mammal. Some animals are not mammals. It follows that all turtles are reptiles. There are no frogs that are mammals. There are some snakes that are reptiles. It follows that some mammals are not snakes.

original_syllogism: Jeder einzelne Busch ist eine Pflanze. Es gibt keine Mineralien, die Blumen sind. Jeder Baum ist ein Lebewesen. Alles, was eine Blume ist, ist ein Lebewesen. Manche Steine ​​sind keine Blumen. Es gibt keine Steine, die Blumen sind. Daher ist kein Stein ein Lebewesen.
english_translated_syllogism: Every individual bush is a plant. There are no minerals that are flowers. Every tree is a living thing. Everything that is a flower is a living being. Some stones are not flowers. There are no stones that are flowers. Therefore no stone is a living thing.

original_syllogism: Ningún conductor ha mirado jamás un mapa. Cada novela tiene un motor y cuatro ruedas. Algunas historias se escriben sobre caminos asfaltados. Todas las carreteras son en realidad estanterías de biblioteca. Es un hecho que puedes leer un volante. Varios coches son libros. Todo lo que es un libro tiene páginas. Por tanto, una parte de las cosas que tienen páginas son coches.
english_translated_syllogism: No driver has ever looked at a map. Each novel has an engine and four wheels. Some stories are written on paved roads. All roads are actually library shelves. It is a fact that you can read a flyer. Several cars are books. Everything that is a book has pages. Therefore, some of the things that have pages are cars.

original_syllogism: É um facto que todas as gramíneas estão mortas. Nada que seja vivo pode ser considerado planta. Cada flor é uma pedra. Não existem folhas que façam parte das plantas. Qualquer arbusto é feito de fogo. É verdade que toda árvore é uma coisa viva. Isto leva à conclusão de que nenhuma árvore é uma planta.
english_translated_syllogism: It is a fact that all grasses are dead. Nothing that is alive can be considered a plant. Each flower is a stone. There are no leaves that are part of plants. Any bush is made of fire. It is true that every tree is a living thing. This leads to the conclusion that no tree is a plant.

original_syllogism: Il est vrai que tous les médecins sont des extraterrestres. Tout homme est un reptile. Chaque enfant est un insecte. Aucun scientifique n’est un organisme biologique. Certains enseignants sont des fantômes. Ce n’est pas vrai que chaque femme est un mammifère. Chaque femme est un être humain. Ainsi, on peut conclure que certains humains ne sont pas des mammifères.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that all doctors are aliens. Every man is a reptile. Every child is an insect. No scientist is a biological organism. Some teachers are ghosts. It is not true that every woman is a mammal. Every woman is a human being. Thus, we can conclude that some humans are not mammals.

original_syllogism: Veel onderzoekers publiceren hun bevindingen. Elke collegezaal heeft zitplaatsen voor luisteraars. Sommige graden duren jaren om te voltooien. Het is waar dat hoger onderwijs waardevol is. Professoren zijn geenszins studenten. Alles wat een professor is, is een academicus. Er zijn academici die geen studenten zijn.
english_translated_syllogism: Many researchers publish their findings. Each lecture hall has seats for listeners. Some degrees take years to complete. It is true that higher education is valuable. Professors are by no means students. Everything a professor is, is an academic. There are academics who are not students.

original_syllogism: పర్వతాలు కేవలం నిద్రిస్తున్న దిగ్గజాలే అన్నది నిజం. కొన్ని రాళ్ళు పిల్లులు. పిల్లి పిల్ల కంటే కఠినమైన ఖనిజం లేదు. కొన్ని గులకరాళ్లు రాత్రి భోజనం కోసం పిల్లి ఆహారాన్ని తింటాయి. అన్ని రాళ్లకు బొచ్చు మరియు తోకలు ఉంటాయి. ప్రతి పిల్లి ఒక క్షీరదం. అందువలన, కొన్ని క్షీరదాలు రాళ్ళు.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that mountains are just sleeping giants. Some stones are cats. No mineral is harder than a kitten. Some pebbles eat cat food for dinner. All rocks have fur and tails. Every cat is a mammal. Therefore, some mammals are rocks.

original_syllogism: Alcuni animali danno alla luce piccoli vivi. Ogni ragno tesse una tela unica. Tutti gli insetti hanno esoscheletri per protezione. Molte piccole creature vivono nell'erba. È noto che le formiche vivono in colonie. Non esiste un singolo insetto che sia un mammifero. Alcuni coleotteri sono annoverati tra gli insetti. Ne consegue che non tutti gli scarabei sono mammiferi.
english_translated_syllogism: Some animals give birth to live young. Each spider weaves a unique web. All insects have exoskeletons for protection. Many small creatures live in the grass. Ants are known to live in colonies. There is no single insect that is a mammal. Some beetles are counted among insects. It follows that not all beetles are mammals.

original_syllogism: কিছু সরীসৃপ ঠান্ডা রক্তের প্রাণী।প্রতিটি বাস্তুতন্ত্র জীবনের ভারসাম্যের উপর নির্ভর করে।কিছু প্রাণী আছে যেগুলো কুকুর।সব পাখিই বাসাতেই ডিম পাড়ে।যারা কুকুর তারা সবাই স্তন্যপায়ী।ফলে প্রতিটি স্তন্যপায়ী প্রাণীই।
english_translated_syllogism: Some reptiles are cold-blooded animals. Every ecosystem depends on the balance of life. There are some animals that are dogs. All birds lay eggs in nests. All dogs are mammals. Consequently, every mammal.

original_syllogism: పరీక్షల కోసం పెన్నులు ఉపయోగించే విద్యార్థులు చాలా మంది ఉన్నారు. ప్రతి కార్యాలయంలో వివిధ రకాల స్టేషనరీలు ఉంటాయి. పెన్సిళ్లు అనేవి ఏవీ సిరా ఉపయోగించే రాసే సాధనాలు కావు. అన్ని రచనలకు సాధారణంగా ఏదో ఒక కాగితం అవసరం. సిరా శాశ్వతంగా లేదా చెరిపివేయబడుతుందనేది వాస్తవం. ప్రతి ఒక్క కలం సిరాను ఉపయోగించే ఒక వ్రాత పరికరం. పెన్సిళ్లు పెన్నులు కావు.
english_translated_syllogism: There are many students who use pens for exams. Every office has different types of stationery. Pencils are not writing instruments that use ink. All works usually require some form of paper. It is a fact that ink can be permanent or erased. Every single pen is a writing instrument that uses ink. Pencils are not pens.

original_syllogism: Einige Platten sind tatsächlich quadratische Wolken. Es gibt kein einziges Utensil, das zum Essen verwendet wird. Alle Messer bestehen aus flüssigem Wasser. Es gibt alle Löffel, die Utensilien sind. Alle Löffel sind aus Metall. Daraus folgt, dass alle Utensilien aus Metall bestehen.
english_translated_syllogism: Some plates are actually square clouds. There is not a single utensil used for eating. All knives are made of liquid water. There are all spoons that are utensils. All spoons are made of metal. It follows that all utensils are made of metal.

original_syllogism: 家庭从收容所收养狗是很常见的事情。所有哺乳动物都用乳汁哺育幼崽。每个狗都是哺乳动物。每只宠物都需要食物和水才能生存。有很多动物既是宠物又是哺乳动物。由此可见，有一些宠物是狗。
english_translated_syllogism: It is common for families to adopt dogs from shelters. All mammals nurse their young with milk. Every dog ​​is a mammal. Every pet needs food and water to survive. There are many animals that are both pets and mammals. It can be seen that some pets are dogs.

original_syllogism: 有些颜色比其他颜色更亮。每年都有许多游客参观巴黎。创造力是普遍存在的，这是事实。一部分艺术家是法国公民。每种文化都有自己的艺术形式。众所周知，一些画家是法国公民。确实有些画家是艺术家。
english_translated_syllogism: Some colors are brighter than others. Many tourists visit Paris every year. Creativity is universal, that’s a fact. Some of the artists are French citizens. Every culture has its own art form. It is known that some painters were French citizens. It is true that some painters are artists.

original_syllogism: Misitu yote ni nyumbani kwa spishi nyingi. Ni kweli kwamba asili inaweza kuwa kali. Mimea mingi hula mimea tu. Kila mazingira hutegemea usawa. Kila dubu ni mtangulizi. Bears zote zinachukuliwa kuwa wanyama wa porini. Sehemu ndogo ya wanyama wa porini sio wanyama wanaowinda.
english_translated_syllogism: All forests are home to many species. It is true that nature can be harsh. Most plants only eat plants. Every environment depends on balance. Every bear is a forerunner. All bears are considered wild animals. A small proportion of wild animals are not predators.

original_syllogism: É verdade que a luz solar mata as flores. Cada rosa é uma coisa viva. Algumas pétalas são, na verdade, facas afiadas. Nenhuma planta jamais cresceu a partir de uma semente. Tudo que é rosa é flor. Um certo número de flores não são coisas vivas.
english_translated_syllogism: It's true that sunlight kills flowers. Every rose is a living thing. Some petals are actually sharp knives. No plant has ever grown from a seed. Everything that is pink is a flower. A number of flowers are not living things.

original_syllogism: Chaque chiot naît en sachant parler français. Aucun chien n’a jamais marché sur quatre pattes. Il n’existe pas d’animaux qui soient aussi des chiens. Il est indéniable que le ciel est vert et l’herbe bleue. Tous les chiens sont en réalité des robots déguisés venus de l’espace. Certains animaux sont entièrement en verre. L’ensemble des chiens fait partie des canines. Il n'y a pas d'animaux qui soient des chiens.
english_translated_syllogism: Every puppy is born knowing how to speak French. No dog has ever walked on four legs. There are no animals that are also dogs. It is undeniable that the sky is green and the grass blue. All the dogs are actually robots in disguise from outer space. Some animals are made entirely of glass. All dogs are canines. There are no animals that are dogs.

original_syllogism: Es ist so, dass alle Biografien Bücher sind. Alles, was ein Roman ist, ist ein Buch. Es gibt keine Broschüren, die Romane sind. Jeder Comic ist eine Art Lesestoff. Es gibt keine Zeitschriften, die man Bücher nennen kann. Es ist nicht so, dass alle Zeitschriften Romane sind.
english_translated_syllogism: The fact is that all biographies are books. Everything that is a novel is a book. There are no pamphlets that are novels. Every comic is a kind of reading material. There are no magazines that can be called books. It's not that all magazines are novels.

original_syllogism: Algunos insectos son ballenas. Es un hecho que todas las aves son reptiles. Es cierto que todo lo que es gato es un mamífero. Cualquier pez es un tipo de mamífero. No hay caballos que sean animales. Cada perro es un pájaro. También es cierto que todos los mamíferos son animales. Así, se concluye que todos los animales son gatos.
english_translated_syllogism: Some insects are whales. It is a fact that all birds are reptiles. It is true that everything that is a cat is a mammal. Any fish is a type of mammal. There are no horses that are animals. Every dog ​​is a bird. It is also true that all mammals are animals. Thus, it is concluded that all animals are cats.

original_syllogism: Kein Arzt hat jemals eine medizinische Fakultät besucht. Manche Mediziner sind tatsächlich ausgebildete Affen. Alle Krankenhäuser sind auf dem Mond gebaut. Nichts, was ein Arzt ist, ist ein medizinischer Fachmann. Jede Operation wird mit einem Löffel durchgeführt. Es stimmt, dass Bandagen aus Beton bestehen. Alle Chirurgen sind medizinische Fachkräfte. Daraus lässt sich ableiten, dass ein Teil der Chirurgen keine Ärzte sind.
english_translated_syllogism: No doctor has ever attended medical school. Some medical professionals are actually trained monkeys. All hospitals are built on the moon. Nothing a doctor is is a medical professional. Each operation is performed with a spoon. It's true that bandages are made of concrete. All surgeons are medical professionals. This suggests that some surgeons are not doctors.

original_syllogism: Cualquier oso es una especie de escarabajo. Es un hecho que todos los lobos son insectos. No hay jirafas que sean mamíferos. Cualquier león es un insecto. Es cierto que ningún insecto es mamífero. Esto lleva a la conclusión de que ningún mamífero es un león.
english_translated_syllogism: Any bear is a kind of beetle. It is a fact that all wolves are insects. There are no giraffes that are mammals. Any lion is an insect. It is true that no insect is a mammal. This leads to the conclusion that no mammal is a lion.

original_syllogism: Tutti i deserti sono pieni di acque profonde. Nessuna barca ha mai galleggiato sull’acqua. È vero che tutti gli oceani sono asciutti. Alcune piogge sono in realtà sabbia calda. Ogni singolo pesce ha paura dell'acqua. È vero che l’Oceano Pacifico è un deserto. Alcuni corpi d'acqua sono oceani. Di conseguenza, alcuni corpi idrici sono asciutti.
english_translated_syllogism: All deserts are filled with deep water. No boat has ever floated on water. It is true that all oceans are dry. Some rain is actually hot sand. Every single fish is afraid of water. It is true that the Pacific Ocean is a desert. Some bodies of water are oceans. As a result, some bodies of water are dry.

original_syllogism: Jeder einzelne Felsbrocken ist leicht genug, um in der Luft zu schweben. Es stimmt, dass alle Himmel aus Beton bestehen. Jeder Regen, der fällt, ist tatsächlich festes Blei. Einige Berge bestehen aus weichem Marshmallow. Es gibt keine Federn, die nicht so schwer wie Eisen sind. Jede Wolke besteht aus Granit. Alle Dinge aus Granit sind leicht genug, um zu schwimmen. Es ist eine logische Konsequenz, dass einige Dinge, die leicht genug sind, um zu schweben, Wolken sind.
english_translated_syllogism: Each individual boulder is light enough to float in the air. It's true that all skies are made of concrete. Any rain that falls is actually solid lead. Some mountains are made of soft marshmallow. There are no feathers that are not as heavy as iron. Every cloud is made of granite. All things made of granite are light enough to float. It is a logical consequence that some things that are light enough to float are clouds.

original_syllogism: হাতুড়ি যা কিছু তাও একটি হাতিয়ার।এটা সত্য যে সব করাতই হাতিয়ার।কোন wrenches যে সবজি আছে. কিছু গাছ সবজি।প্রতিটি গাজর একটি সবজি।কোন হাতিয়ার নেই যে সবজি হয়. ফলে কিছু সবজি হাতুড়ি নয় বলে সিদ্ধান্তে আসা যায়।
english_translated_syllogism: Anything that is a hammer is also a tool. It is true that all saws are tools. There are no wrenches that are vegetables. Some plants are vegetables. Every carrot is a vegetable. There is no tool that is a vegetable. As a result, it can be concluded that some vegetables are not hammer.

original_syllogism: É verdade que todas as baleias azuis são invisíveis a olho nu. Não existem hipopótamos maiores que uma partícula de poeira. Cada girafa é menor que uma formiga. Qualquer cavalo é um organismo microscópico. Qualquer coisa que seja um elefante é microscópica. Todo objeto que é uma vaca é um elefante. Portanto, não existem vacas que não sejam microscópicas.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that all blue whales are invisible to the naked eye. There are no hippos larger than a speck of dust. Each giraffe is smaller than an ant. Any horse is a microscopic organism. Anything that is an elephant is microscopic. Every object that is a cow is an elephant. Therefore, there are no cows that are not microscopic.

original_syllogism: Nessun animale è a sangue caldo. Ogni gatto ha piume invece di pelliccia. È un dato di fatto che il latte è velenoso per i gatti. Alcune delle cose che sono animali sono mammiferi. Tra le cose che sono gatti, alcune sono animali. Ne consegue che alcuni gatti non sono mammiferi.
english_translated_syllogism: No animal is warm-blooded. Every cat has feathers instead of fur. It is a fact that milk is poisonous to cats. Some of the things that are animals are mammals. Among the things that are cats, some are animals. It follows that some cats are not mammals.

original_syllogism: 在星星的事物中，有一些是房子。有些小行星内部有客厅。月亮是一座两层公寓，这是事实。没有哪个星系比花园小屋更大。所有的星星都是天体。由此可见，一些天体是房屋。
english_translated_syllogism: Among the things in the stars, some are houses. Some asteroids have living rooms inside them. The moon is a two-story apartment building, that's a fact. No galaxy is bigger than a garden shed. All stars are celestial bodies. It follows that some celestial bodies are houses.

original_syllogism: Cada fantasma es una criatura mítica. Es cierto que los unicornios viven en los parques de las ciudades. Ningún libro de cuentos ha sido jamás ficticio. Algunas criaturas míticas son verdaderos políticos. Existen algunos fantasmas que también son humanos. Por tanto, se da el caso de que algunos humanos son criaturas míticas.
english_translated_syllogism: Each ghost is a mythical creature. It is true that unicorns live in city parks. No storybook has ever been fictional. Some mythical creatures are real politicians. There are some ghosts that are also human. Therefore, it is the case that some humans are mythical creatures.

original_syllogism: Todos os carpinteiros trabalham com madeira. Sabe-se que o aço é um material resistente. Muitas antiguidades são feitas à mão. Cada item de madeira é algo diferente de um item de metal. Existem cadeiras que são itens de madeira. Deve ser verdade que algumas cadeiras não são itens de metal.
english_translated_syllogism: All carpenters work with wood. It is known that steel is a resistant material. Many antiques are made by hand. Every wooden item is something different from a metal item. There are chairs that are wooden items. It must be true that some chairs are not metal items.

original_syllogism: 没有汽车是蔬菜。没有不是沙拉的摩托车。有些火车是可食用的植物。确实，所有飞机都是水果。每一辆卡车都是绿叶茂盛的。有些车辆是汽车。这意味着每辆车都是蔬菜。
english_translated_syllogism: No car is a vegetable. There is no motorcycle that is not a salad. Some trains are edible plants. Indeed, all planes are fruit. Every truck is leafy. Some vehicles are cars. This means every car is a vegetable.

original_syllogism: এটা সত্য যে ম্যানুফ্যাকচারিং বিকশিত হয়েছে।সমস্ত উপকরণ বিভিন্ন বৈশিষ্ট্য আছে. এমন কোন আইটেম নেই যা কাঠের এবং প্লাস্টিকের তৈরি।কিছু টেবিল কাঁচের তৈরি।এটি এমন যে কিছু আসবাবপত্র প্লাস্টিকের তৈরি।এর থেকে, আমরা যৌক্তিকভাবে বুঝতে পারি যে কিছু আসবাবপত্র কাঠের তৈরি নয়।
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that manufacturing has evolved. All materials have different properties. There are no items that are made of wood and plastic. Some tables are made of glass. It is like that some furniture is made of plastic. From this, we can logically understand that some furniture is not made of wood.

original_syllogism: É certo que todo cachorro é um mamífero. Existem alguns animais de estimação que não são mamíferos. Qualquer gato é um mamífero. É verdade que todos os humanos são mamíferos. É verdade que alguns animais são mamíferos. Com base nisso, existem alguns animais que não são cães.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that every dog ​​is a mammal. There are some pets that are not mammals. Any cat is a mammal. It is true that all humans are mammals. It is true that some animals are mammals. Based on this, there are some animals that are not dogs.

original_syllogism: Het is waar dat getallen geen concepten zijn. Elke gedachte is een fysiek object. Er zijn geen herinneringen die niet vloeibaar zijn. Elke emotie is een stevige rots. Het is een feit dat alle dromen van staal zijn gemaakt. Er zijn mensen die cijfers zijn. Hieruit volgt dat alle mensen concepten zijn.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that numbers are not concepts. Every thought is a physical object. There are no memories that are not fluid. Every emotion is a solid rock. The fact is that all dreams are made of steel. There are people who are numbers. It follows that all people are concepts.

original_syllogism: 事实上，所有彗星都是马苏里拉奶酪。每个月亮都是由切达干酪制成的。有些星系是由瑞士奶酪制成的。没有什么黑洞不是波罗沃龙干酪的。任何小行星都是高达块。任何恒星天体都是由奶酪制成的。有些太阳不是由奶酪制成的。因此，有些太阳并不是恒星。
english_translated_syllogism: In fact, all comets are mozzarella. Every moon is made of cheddar cheese. Some galaxies are made of Swiss cheese. There’s no black hole that isn’t provolone. Any asteroid is a Gundam block. Any stellar object is made of cheese. Some suns aren't made of cheese. Therefore, some suns are not stars.

original_syllogism: Любая улитка движется с огромной скоростью. Каждый ленивец — быстрый бегун. Это правда, что все морские звезды быстрые. Все, что является животным, быстро. Некоторые моллюски — быстрые животные. Каждая черепаха – животное. Не бывает черепах, которые бы не были быстрыми.
english_translated_syllogism: Any snail moves at great speed. Every sloth is a fast runner. It's true that all starfish are fast. Anything that is animal is fast. Some mollusks are fast animals. Every turtle is an animal. There are no turtles that are not fast.

original_syllogism: এটা সত্য যে পেঙ্গুইনরা সাঁতার কাটা পাখি।অনেক প্রজাতির পাখি দক্ষিণে চলে যায়।সব ঈগল উঁচু জায়গায় বাসা বাঁধে।প্রতিটি তোতাপাখি মানুষের শব্দ নকল করতে পারে।প্রতিটি জিনিস যা একটি পাখি উড়তে সক্ষম।কিছু তোতাপাখি আছে যেগুলো পাখি।ফলস্বরূপ, এটি যৌক্তিকভাবে বোঝায় যে কিছু তোতাপাখি উড়তে সক্ষম হতে পারে।
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that penguins are swimming birds. Many species of birds migrate south. All eagles nest in high places. Every parrot can imitate human sounds.

original_syllogism: 没有行星是太空中的物体。事实上，所有的卫星都是由纸板制成的。没有绕太阳运行的小行星。每一颗星星都是纸上的图画。有些彗星不在太空中。任何星系都是一个小玩具。所有属于木星的东西都是行星。这意味着木星上的一些物体并不是太空中的物体。
english_translated_syllogism: No planet is an object in space. In fact, all satellites are made of cardboard. There are no asteroids orbiting the sun. Each star is a picture on paper. Some comets are not in space. Any galaxy is a small toy. Everything that is Jupiter is a planet. This means that some objects on Jupiter are not objects in space.

original_syllogism: Не существует рыб, которые не были бы живыми существами. Дело в том, что все насекомые являются животными. Каждое животное является живым существом. Любое растение – живое существо. Некоторые живые существа являются бактериями. Каждое млекопитающее является существом. Некоторые существа являются животными. Следовательно, все существа являются живыми существами.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no fish that are not living beings. The fact is that all insects are animals. Every animal is a living being. Any plant is a living being. Some living things are bacteria. Every mammal is a creature. Some creatures are animals. Therefore, all beings are living entities.

original_syllogism: Es cierto que todos los periódicos son invisibles. No existen enciclopedias que contengan palabras. Todos los libros son cosas que son obras escritas. Cualquier poema es un sonido silencioso. Cada novela es una página en blanco. Ningún diccionario es una obra escrita. En consecuencia, ningún diccionario es un libro.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that all newspapers are invisible. There are no encyclopedias that contain words. All books are things that are written works. Any poem is a silent sound. Every novel is a blank page. No dictionary is a written work. Consequently, no dictionary is a book.

original_syllogism: 有些哺乳动物生活在野外。每种动物都有独特的特征。任何狗都是哺乳动物。许多家庭喜欢在家养动物。有些宠物恰好是哺乳动物。因此，有些宠物是狗。
english_translated_syllogism: Some mammals live in the wild. Each animal has unique characteristics. Any dog ​​is a mammal. Many families enjoy keeping animals at home. Some pets happen to be mammals. Therefore, some pets are dogs.

original_syllogism: Tutti i gatti appartengono anche al regno animale. Alcuni animali domestici sono addestrati a eseguire acrobazie. È vero che la zoologia è lo studio degli animali. Molte creature abitano le foreste del mondo. Ogni mammifero è un animale. È risaputo che tutti i cani sono animali. Pertanto, ne consegue che tutti i cani sono mammiferi.
english_translated_syllogism: All cats also belong to the animal kingdom. Some pets are trained to perform tricks. It is true that zoology is the study of animals. Many creatures inhabit the world's forests. Every mammal is an animal. It is well known that all dogs are animals. Therefore, it follows that all dogs are mammals.

original_syllogism: 每只犬科动物都是哺乳动物。有些动物是肉食性猎人。许多品种的狗都被驯化。哺乳动物有温血，这是事实。任何哺乳动物都是狗。这意味着每只狗都是犬科动物。
english_translated_syllogism: Every canine is a mammal. Some animals are carnivorous hunters. Many breeds of dogs have been domesticated. It is a fact that mammals have warm blood. Any mammal is a dog. This means that every dog ​​is a canine.

original_syllogism: In allen Zoos gibt es kein Leben. Kein Säugetier hat ein Herz. Kein einziges Lebewesen, das ein Hund ist, ist ein Tier. Manche Bären sind tatsächlich Roboter. Jedes einzelne Säugetier ist ein Hund. Es muss so sein, dass kein Säugetier ein Tier ist.
english_translated_syllogism: There is no life in all zoos. No mammal has a heart. Not a single creature that is a dog is an animal. Some bears are actually robots. Every single mammal is a dog. It must be the case that no mammal is an animal.

original_syllogism: Chochote ambacho ni mbwa ni feline. Hakuna nyati ambazo ni felines. Kila paka moja ni canine. Wanyama wengine sio felines. Hakuna poodles ambazo zinaweza kuitwa felines. Kuna poodles kadhaa ambazo sio mbwa.
english_translated_syllogism: Anything that is a dog is a feline. There are no unicorns that are felines. Every single cat is a canine. Other animals are not felines. No poodles can be called felines. There are several poodles that are not dogs.

original_syllogism: 有些动物是由纯电构成的。所有大象实际上都是植物。事实上，皮毛会阻碍运动。每只狗都是一种动物。事实上，没有任何一种哺乳动物是狗。肯定没有哺乳动物是动物。
english_translated_syllogism: Some animals are made of pure electricity. All elephants are actually plants. In fact, fur can hinder movement. Every dog ​​is an animal. In fact, no mammal is a dog. There are certainly no mammals that are animals.

original_syllogism: Ci sono alcuni uccelli che sono aeroplani. Alcune nuvole sono fatte di piume. Tutti gli elicotteri depongono le uova nei nidi. Nessuna macchina ha mai volato in cielo. Ogni singolo aereo è una cosa che può volare. Ne consegue che ogni singola cosa che può volare è un uccello.
english_translated_syllogism: There are some birds that are airplanes. Some clouds are made of feathers. All helicopters lay eggs in nests. No car has ever flown in the sky. Every single plane is a thing that can fly. It follows that every single thing that can fly is a bird.

original_syllogism: ఫర్నిచర్ అయిన ఏదైనా వస్తువు మేఘం. కొన్ని దీపాలు ఘనీభవించిన పొగమంచు. ప్రతి ఒక్క డెస్క్ నీటి ఆవిరితో తయారు చేయబడింది. పొగమంచుతో చేయని క్యాబినెట్‌లు లేవు. కొన్ని కుర్చీలు మేఘాలు కావు. ఇది కొన్ని కుర్చీలు ఫర్నిచర్ కాదని సూచిస్తుంది.
english_translated_syllogism: Any object that is furniture is a cloud. Some lamps are frozen fog. Each desk is made of water vapor. There are no cabinets that aren't made of fog. Some chairs are not clouds. This indicates that some chairs are not furniture.

original_syllogism: Het is een feit dat alle konijnen spinnen zijn. Alles wat een hond is, is een kat. Elke hamster is een reptiel. Er zijn geen goudvissen die huisdieren zijn. Sommige dieren zijn geen katten. Elke vogel is een vis. Er zijn enkele huisdieren die geen katten zijn. Daarom zijn alle huisdieren honden.
english_translated_syllogism: The fact is that all rabbits are spiders. Everything a dog is, is a cat. Every hamster is a reptile. There are no goldfish that are pets. Some animals are not cats. Every bird is a fish. There are some pets that are not cats. Therefore, all pets are dogs.

original_syllogism: Alle Adler haben Hufe statt Krallen. Noch nie ist ein Pferd auf dem Boden gelaufen. Es ist eine Tatsache, dass Papageien gerne Heu fressen. Alles, was ein Pferd ist, ist ein Tier. Manche Nester sind eigentlich Ställe. Alle Tiere sind Vögel. Daher ist jeder einzelne Vogel ein Pferd.
english_translated_syllogism: All eagles have hooves instead of claws. No horse has ever walked on the ground. It is a fact that parrots love to eat hay. Everything that is a horse is an animal. Some nests are actually stables. All animals are birds. Therefore every single bird is a horse.

original_syllogism: Chochote na kila kitu ambacho ni kitabu ni hai. Maneno yote yanaweza kuruka kwenye ukurasa. Ni ukweli kwamba kusoma husababisha hiccups. Hakuna karatasi iliyowahi kufanywa kutoka kwa miti. Vitabu vingine ni aina ya kamusi. Ni kesi kwamba kamusi zingine ziko hai.
english_translated_syllogism: Anything and everything that is a book is alive. All the words can jump off the page. It is a fact that reading causes hiccups. No paper was ever made from trees. Some books are a kind of dictionary. It is the case that some dictionaries are alive.

original_syllogism: Watangulizi wengine huwinda usiku. Viumbe vyote vinahitaji chakula ili kuishi. Ni ukweli kwamba biolojia ni utafiti wa maisha. Kila ikolojia imeunganishwa. Kila mnyama ni kitu hai. Ni kweli kwamba wanyama wengine ni paka. Hii inasababisha hitimisho kwamba kila paka ni kitu hai.
english_translated_syllogism: Some pioneers hunt at night. All living things need food to survive. It is a fact that biology is the study of life. Every ecosystem is connected. Every animal is a living thing. It is true that some animals are cats. This leads to the conclusion that every cat is a living thing.

original_syllogism: Elke sinaasappel is een vrucht. Er zijn geen appels die groenten zijn. Het is waar dat alle bananen vruchten zijn. Elke wortel is een groente. Sommige vruchten zijn appels. Dit leidt logischerwijs tot de conclusie dat sommige soorten fruit groenten zijn.
english_translated_syllogism: Every orange is a fruit. There are no apples that are vegetables. It is true that all bananas are fruits. Every carrot is a vegetable. Some fruits are apples. This logically leads to the conclusion that some fruits are vegetables.

original_syllogism: Cada brócoli es una verdura. Es cierto que todas las frutas son comestibles. Cualquier patata es una verdura. Algunas cosas comestibles son granos. Hay algunas raíces que son comestibles. Cada vegetal es comestible. Todo lo que es una zanahoria es una verdura. No hay zanahorias que no sean comestibles.
english_translated_syllogism: Each broccoli is a vegetable. It is true that all fruits are edible. Any potato is a vegetable. Some edible things are grains. There are some roots that are edible. Every vegetable is edible. Everything that is a carrot is a vegetable. There are no carrots that are not edible.

original_syllogism: 许多设备需要电力才能运行。所有机器都是由人类制造的。有些技术是由硅和金属制成的。众所周知，软件是在硬件上运行的。每项发明都有特定的目的。计算机之类的东西绝不是有机的。任何计算机也是一种工具。存在一些不是有机物的工具。
english_translated_syllogism: Many devices require electricity to operate. All machines are made by humans. Some technologies are made of silicon and metal. As we all know, software runs on hardware. Every invention has a specific purpose. Things like computers are never organic. Any computer is also a tool. There are tools that are not organic.

original_syllogism: Некоторые рыбы тонут в воде. Группа животных не пересекается с группой живых существ. Ни одно существо никогда не двигалось. Все камни живые и дышащие. Каждое живое существо – это кошка. Совершенно верно, что некоторые кошки не являются животными.
english_translated_syllogism: Some fish drown in water. A group of animals does not overlap with a group of living beings. Not a single creature ever moved. All stones are living and breathing. Every living creature is a cat. It is absolutely true that some cats are not animals.

original_syllogism: কোনো প্রাইমেট কখনো গাছে ওঠেনি।এটা সত্য যে সমুদ্র কঠিন।সব মানুষই প্রাইমেট।কিছু পাখি ধাতু দিয়ে তৈরি।প্রতিটি মানুষই পশু।অতএব, সমস্ত প্রাণী প্রাইমেট হতে হবে।
english_translated_syllogism: No primate has ever climbed a tree. It is true that the ocean is hard. All humans are primates. Some birds are made of metal. Every human is an animal. Therefore, all animals must be primates.

original_syllogism: Chiunque sia un medico è un essere umano. Non esistono fantasmi che siano medici. Ogni insegnante è una persona. Alcuni esseri non sono medici. Ogni singola infermiera è un essere umano. Non esistono alieni che siano medici. Di conseguenza, nessuno straniero è un medico.
english_translated_syllogism: Anyone who is a doctor is a human being. There are no ghosts who are doctors. Every teacher is a person. Some beings are not doctors. Every single nurse is a human being. There are no aliens who are doctors. Consequently, no foreigner is a doctor.

original_syllogism: Bustani zote zina udongo kwa mizizi ya mimea. Kuna mimea mingi ambayo inahitaji jua kukua. Maua mengine yanajulikana kwa Bloom tu katika chemchemi. Roses zote ni mimea. Ni kesi kwamba photosynthesis ni muhimu kwa mimea. Kila rose moja ina miiba kwenye shina lake. Kila rose moja ni maua. Hii inamaanisha kuwa maua yote ni mimea.
english_translated_syllogism: All gardens have soil for plant roots. There are many plants that need sunlight to grow. Some flowers are known to bloom only in the spring. All roses are plants. It is the case that photosynthesis is important for plants. Every single rose has thorns on its stem. Every single rose is a flower. This means that all flowers are plants.

original_syllogism: У каждой собаки есть крылья. Любое млекопитающее является разновидностью насекомых. У некоторых рыб есть ноги. Это факт, что все пауки являются млекопитающими. Любой, кто является существом с ногами, является млекопитающим. Каждое существо, которое является кошкой, является млекопитающим. Это приводит к выводу, что некоторые кошки не являются существами с ногами.
english_translated_syllogism: Every dog ​​has wings. Every mammal is a type of insect. Some fish have legs. It is a fact that all spiders are mammals. Anything that is a creature with legs is a mammal. Every creature that is a cat is a mammal. This leads to the conclusion that some cats are not creatures with legs.

original_syllogism: Todos os peixes vivem no topo das montanhas. Qualquer coisa que seja um ser humano pode respirar debaixo d’água. Nenhum nadador se molha na piscina. É fato que a água está seca. Existem alguns nadadores que são humanos. Segue-se necessariamente que alguns nadadores podem respirar debaixo d'água.
english_translated_syllogism: All fish live on mountain tops. Anything that is a human can breathe underwater. No swimmer gets wet in the pool. It is a fact that the water is dry. There are some swimmers who are human. It necessarily follows that some swimmers can breathe underwater.

original_syllogism: Cualquier lluvia es en realidad una piedra. Cada río está hecho de hielo. Es cierto que todos los océanos están congelados. No hay bebidas que sean líquidas. Cada partícula de un líquido es sólida. Algo de vapor es un bloque de madera. Ningún sólido es agua. Esto implica que parte del agua no es líquida.
english_translated_syllogism: Any rain is actually a stone. Every river is made of ice. It is true that all the oceans are frozen. There are no drinks that are liquid. Every particle of a liquid is solid. Some steam is a block of wood. No solid is water. This implies that some of the water is not liquid.

original_syllogism: కొన్ని పత్రాలు డిజిటల్ ఫైల్‌లు. ప్రతి ఒక్క నవల వ్రాసిన రచన. పుస్తకం అని ఏదీ డిజిటల్ ఫైల్ కాదు. హార్డ్ కవర్లన్నీ పుస్తకాలే అన్నది నిజం. పేపర్‌బ్యాక్‌లుగా ఉన్న విషయాలన్నీ పుస్తకాలే. అందువల్ల, కొన్ని పేపర్‌బ్యాక్‌లు డిజిటల్ ఫైల్‌లు కావు.
english_translated_syllogism: Some documents are digital files. Every single novel is a written work. A book is not a digital file. It is true that all hardcover books are books. All things that are paperbacks are books. Therefore, some paperbacks are not digital files.

original_syllogism: Er zijn geen katten die elektronica zijn. Het is zo dat alle honden dieren zijn. Niets dat een elektronisch apparaat is, is ook een dier. Elke telefoon is een elektronisch apparaat. Elke tablet is een gadget. Sommige machines zijn elektronica. Elke computer is een elektronisch apparaat. Er zijn dus geen computers die dieren zijn.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no cats that are electronics. It is true that all dogs are animals. Nothing that is an electronic device is also an animal. Every phone is an electronic device. Every tablet is a gadget. Some machines are electronics. Every computer is an electronic device. So there are no computers that are animals.

original_syllogism: কিছু ডেস্ক প্রাণী।এটা সত্য যে চেয়ার যা কিছু আসবাবপত্র।যে কোন প্রদীপ একটি জীবন্ত জিনিস।আসবাবপত্র কোন সোফা নেই।প্রতিটি টেবিল একটি মেঘ।এটা সত্য যে সমস্ত বিছানা জল দিয়ে তৈরি।এটাও সত্য যে সব আসবাবপত্রই বস্তু।সুতরাং, এটি উপসংহারে পৌঁছেছে যে সমস্ত বস্তুই চেয়ার।
english_translated_syllogism: Some desks are animals. It is true that chairs are all furniture. Any lamp is a living thing. Furniture is no sofa. Every table is a cloud. It is true that all beds are made of water. It is also true that all furniture is matter. Therefore, it is concluded that all matters are chairs.

original_syllogism: Tout oiseau a des ailes. Tout chat a un bec. Chaque chien a des plumes. Il est vrai que tous les éléphants savent voler. Il n'y a pas de fourmis qui soient des oiseaux. Certains insectes n'ont pas d'ailes. De là, tous les insectes sont des oiseaux.
english_translated_syllogism: Every bird has wings. Every cat has a beak. Every dog ​​has feathers. It is true that all elephants can fly. There are no ants that are birds. Some insects do not have wings. Hence, all insects are birds.

original_syllogism: Alles wat een vogel is, is een wezen. Geen enkel wezen op aarde heeft water nodig om te leven. Sommige vogels leven diep onder de grond in tunnels. Elk dier is eigenlijk een soort groente. Alle dingen die vissen kunnen worden genoemd, zijn wezens. Elke vis is een vogel.
english_translated_syllogism: Everything that is a bird is a creature. No creature on earth needs water to live. Some birds live deep underground in tunnels. Every animal is actually a kind of vegetable. All things that can be called fish are creatures. Every fish is a bird.

original_syllogism: Todas las bandas practican antes de un concierto. Muchas canciones están escritas con emoción. Es común que los artistas colaboren. Cada orquesta tiene un director. Algunos instrumentos son difíciles de aprender. Hay algunas personas creativas que son compositores. Todos los compositores son músicos. De esto se desprende que cada músico es una persona creativa.
english_translated_syllogism: All bands practice before a concert. Many songs are written with emotion. It is common for artists to collaborate. Each orchestra has a conductor. Some instruments are difficult to learn. There are some creative people who are songwriters. All composers are musicians. From this it follows that every musician is a creative person.

original_syllogism: Dieren zijn nooit dinosaurussen. Sommige reptielen vliegen in de ruimte. Er is nooit een bot gevonden. Elke dinosaurus leeft nog. Een paar dinosaurussen zijn in feite zoogdieren. Er bestaan ​​zoogdieren die geen dieren zijn.
english_translated_syllogism: Animals are never dinosaurs. Some reptiles fly in space. No bone was ever found. Every dinosaur is still alive. A few dinosaurs are in fact mammals. Mammals exist that are not animals.

original_syllogism: ఒక్కో సోఫా ఒక్కో రకం మొక్క. చెక్కతో చేసిన ఏ వస్తువును ఫర్నిచర్‌గా పరిగణించలేము. కొన్ని పడకలు నిజానికి ఆకాశంలో మేఘాలు. అన్ని పట్టికలు అదృశ్య వాయువుతో తయారు చేయబడ్డాయి. కుర్చీల ఉపసమితి చెక్క వస్తువులుగా గుర్తించబడింది. పర్యవసానంగా, కొన్ని కుర్చీలు ఫర్నిచర్ కాదు.
english_translated_syllogism: Each sofa is a different type of plant. Any item made of wood cannot be considered as furniture. Some beds are actually clouds in the sky. All tables are made of invisible gas. A subset of chairs are marked as wooden items. Consequently, some chairs are not furniture.

original_syllogism: Jedes Blatt absorbiert Sonnenlicht. Rosen haben Wurzeln. Es stimmt, dass Gartenarbeit beliebt ist. Alle Bäume wachsen aus dem Boden. Manche Böden sind reich an Nährstoffen. Jede Rose ist eine blühende Pflanze. Daher müssen alle Blütenpflanzen Wurzeln haben.
english_translated_syllogism: Each leaf absorbs sunlight. Roses have roots. It's true that gardening is popular. All trees grow from the ground. Some soils are rich in nutrients. Every rose is a flowering plant. Therefore, all flowering plants must have roots.

original_syllogism: Ni kweli kwamba misitu yote ni mimea. Hakuna kokoto ambazo ni mimea. Maua yoyote ni mmea. Kila mti ni chombo ambacho ni mmea. Hakuna mwamba ambao ni mmea. Kutoka kwa hii, inafuata kuwa hakuna mwamba ni mti.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that all forests are plants. No pebbles are plants. Any flower is a plant. Every tree is an entity that is a plant. There is no rock that is a plant. From this, it follows that no rock is a tree.

original_syllogism: Einige Gewässer sind bekanntermaßen Süßwasserseen. Es gibt viele Lebewesen, die im Ozean leben. Es stimmt, dass kein Mensch ohne Ausrüstung unter Wasser atmen kann. Alles, was ein Fisch ist, lebt im Wasser. Alle Menschen benötigen Sauerstoff, um den Tag zu überleben. Jeder einzelne Ozean auf der Erde enthält Salzwasser. Keiner der Menschen ist ein Fisch. Daraus folgt, dass kein Mensch im Wasser lebt.
english_translated_syllogism: Some bodies of water are known to be freshwater lakes. There are many creatures that live in the ocean. It is true that no person can breathe underwater without equipment. Everything that is a fish lives in water. All humans need oxygen to survive the day. Every single ocean on earth contains salt water. None of the people are fish. It follows that no human being lives in water.

original_syllogism: Manche Reptilien sind Lebewesen aus reinem Glas. Es ist bekannt, dass alle Vögel aus Kaugummi bestehen. Jedes Tier, das eine Maus ist, besteht aus massivem Stahl. Es gibt keine Katzen, die nicht aus Flüssigseife bestehen. Jeder einzelne Hund ist komplett aus Holz gefertigt. Tatsache ist, dass alles, was aus Flüssigseife besteht, ein Reptil ist. Daraus können wir schließen, dass einige Reptilien Katzen sind.
english_translated_syllogism: Some reptiles are creatures made of pure glass. It is known that all birds are made of gum. Every animal that is a mouse is made of solid steel. There are no cats that are not made of liquid soap. Every single dog is made entirely of wood. The fact is that anything made of liquid soap is a reptile. From this we can conclude that some reptiles are cats.

original_syllogism: Все существа, имеющие мозг, являются млекопитающими. Это правда, что у всех лошадей есть мозги. Есть несколько млекопитающих, которые не являются кошками. Некоторые млекопитающие — животные с мехом. Каждый тигр — существо с мозгом. Любая собака – млекопитающее. Каждое существо, которое является кошкой, является млекопитающим. Это приводит к выводу, что есть кошки, у которых нет мозга.
english_translated_syllogism: All creatures with a brain are mammals. It's true that all horses have brains. There are several mammals that are not cats. Some mammals are animals with fur. Every tiger is a creature with a brain. Any dog ​​is a mammal. Every creature that is a cat is a mammal. This leads to the conclusion that there are cats that do not have a brain.

original_syllogism: Alle mensen zijn zoogdieren met ruggengraat. Elk wezen dat een dolfijn is, is een zoogdier. Alles wat een ruggengraat heeft, is een zoogdier. Er zijn geen honden die geen ruggengraat hebben. Het is waar dat sommige dieren met ruggengraat reptielen zijn. Elke vis heeft een ruggengraat. Elke walvis is een zoogdier. Er kan noodzakelijkerwijs worden geconcludeerd dat elke walvis een ruggengraat heeft.
english_translated_syllogism: All humans are mammals with backbones. Any creature that is a dolphin is a mammal. Anything that has a backbone is a mammal. There are no dogs that don't have a backbone. It is true that some animals with backbones are reptiles. Every fish has a backbone. Every whale is a mammal. It can necessarily be concluded that every whale has a backbone.

original_syllogism: Todos os bancos são animais selvagens. Nenhum quarto jamais foi decorado. Não é verdade que os móveis sejam cadeiras. Cada banquinho é um tipo de vegetal. Alguns sofás podem correr uma maratona. É verdade que sentar é impossível. Existem alguns assentos compostos por cadeiras. Deve ser que alguns assentos não sejam móveis.
english_translated_syllogism: All banks are wild animals. No room was ever decorated. It is not true that furniture is chairs. Each stool is a type of vegetable. Some sofas can run a marathon. It's true that sitting is impossible. There are some seats made up of chairs. It must be that some seats are not movable.

original_syllogism: Non esistono persone che invecchiano. È un dato di fatto che tutte le donne non muoiono mai. Ogni singolo uomo è un dio. Ogni singolo mortale è immortale. Alcuni bambini sono esseri eterni. È vero che alcuni esseri umani sono mortali. Ciò rende vero che ogni essere umano è immortale.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no people who age. It is a fact that all women never die. Every single man is a god. Every single mortal is immortal. Some children are eternal beings. It is true that some human beings are mortal. This makes it true that every human being is immortal.

original_syllogism: Niets dat vloeibaar is, is water. Een deel van de frisdrank verdampt onmiddellijk. Geen enkele beker kan vloeistof bevatten. Het is een feit dat dorst wordt genezen door stof. Elk drankje is gemaakt van droog zand. Al het sap is een stevig blok steen. Een deel van de dingen die dranken zijn, is water. Hieruit volgt dat sommige dranken geen vloeistoffen zijn.
english_translated_syllogism: Nothing that is liquid is water. Some of the soda evaporates immediately. No cup can hold liquid. It is a fact that thirst is cured by dust. Each drink is made from dry sand. All the sap is a solid block of stone. Some of the things that are drinks are water. It follows that some drinks are not liquids.

original_syllogism: Sommige klussen zijn gemakkelijker met de juiste uitrusting. De groep schroevendraaiers en de groep hamers kruisen elkaar niet. Het is een feit dat bouwen vakwerk is. Voor de meeste reparaties zijn specifieke instrumenten nodig. Alle bestaande hamers zijn werktuigen. Het moet zo zijn dat sommige gereedschappen geen schroevendraaiers zijn.
english_translated_syllogism: Some jobs are easier with the right equipment. The group of screwdrivers and the group of hammers do not intersect. It is a fact that construction is craftsmanship. Most repairs require specific tools. All existing hammers are tools. It must be that some tools are not screwdrivers.

original_syllogism: Не существует моркови, которая была бы животным. Любое яблоко – это фрукт. Не существует фруктов, которые были бы животными. Некоторые растения не являются животными. Это правда, что ни один компьютер не является животным. Это означает, что никакой компьютер не является фруктом.
english_translated_syllogism: There is no carrot that is an animal. Any apple is a fruit. There are no fruits that are animals. Some plants are not animals. It is true that no computer is an animal. This means that no computer is a fruit.

original_syllogism: Tutto ciò che è una rosa è anche una pianta. È noto che la luce solare aiuta la fotosintesi. Molte persone apprezzano il profumo delle rose in fiore. Alcune piante richiedono annaffiature giornaliere. Ogni botanico studia la vita delle piante. Tutti i giardini contengono varie specie di flora. Esistono rose che sono fiori. Ne consegue necessariamente che alcuni fiori sono piante.
english_translated_syllogism: Everything that is a rose is also a plant. Sunlight is known to aid photosynthesis. Many people enjoy the scent of blooming roses. Some plants require daily watering. Every botanist studies plant life. All gardens contain various species of flora. There are roses that are flowers. It necessarily follows that some flowers are plants.

original_syllogism: గొరిల్లాలన్నీ పొదలే అన్నది నిజం. కొన్ని జంతువులు మొక్కలు కావు. ఏ కోతి అయినా ఒక పువ్వు. జంతువులు అని చింపాంజీలు లేవు. ప్రతి ప్రైమేట్ ఒక మొక్క. ప్రతి ఒక్క కోతి చెట్టు. అన్ని మానవుల సమితిలో మొక్కలు లేవు. మానవులు కాని కొన్ని ప్రైమేట్స్ ఉన్నాయి.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that all gorillas are bush. Some animals are not plants. Any monkey is a flower. Chimpanzees are not animals. Every primate is a plant. Every single monkey is a tree. Not all human beings have plants. There are some primates that are not human.

original_syllogism: Certains appareils électroniques sont des téléviseurs. Chaque téléphone est un appareil électronique. Il n’existe pas de magazines électroniques. Il est vrai que tous les romans sont des livres. Tout ce qui est un ordinateur est un appareil électronique. Aucun des appareils électroniques n’est un livre. Cela prouve qu’aucun livre n’est un ordinateur.
english_translated_syllogism: Some electronic devices are televisions. Every phone is an electronic device. There are no electronic magazines. It is true that all novels are books. Anything that is a computer is an electronic device. None of the electronic devices are books. This proves that no book is a computer.

original_syllogism: Tutto ciò che è un uccello depone le uova. Ogni singola anatra è un uccello. Alcuni uccelli sono creature che costruiscono nidi. Qualsiasi struzzo è un uccello che depone le uova. Non esistono pinguini che non depongono le uova. Non esistono polli che non siano uccelli. È il caso che alcune galline depongano le uova.
english_translated_syllogism: Anything that is a bird lays eggs. Every single duck is a bird. Some birds are nest-building creatures. Any ostrich is an egg-laying bird. There are no penguins that don't lay eggs. There are no chickens that are not birds. It is the case that some chickens lay eggs.

original_syllogism: Chaque bus est un véhicule. Certains patins à roulettes sont des jouets. Tout vélo est un mode de transport. Il n’y a pas de trains qui ne soient pas des véhicules. Il est vrai que tous les camions sont des véhicules. Tout ce qui est une voiture est un véhicule. Certains skateboards ne sont pas des véhicules. Cela conduit logiquement à la conclusion que certains skateboards ne sont pas des voitures.
english_translated_syllogism: Each bus is a vehicle. Some roller skates are toys. Every bicycle is a mode of transport. There are no trains that are not vehicles. It is true that all trucks are vehicles. Anything that is a car is a vehicle. Some skateboards are not vehicles. This logically leads to the conclusion that some skateboards are not cars.

original_syllogism: È un dato di fatto che la pelliccia è un tipo di metallo. Ogni singola volpe è un tipo di verdura. Alcuni cuccioli si schiudono dalle uova. Non esistono cani che siano animali. Tutti i lupi sono fatti di plastica. Tutto ciò che è un cane è un canide. Alcuni canidi non sono, infatti, animali.
english_translated_syllogism: It is a fact that fur is a type of metal. Every single fox is a type of vegetable. Some hatchlings hatch from eggs. There are no dogs that are animals. All wolves are made of plastic. Anything that is a dog is a canid. Some canids are not, in fact, animals.

original_syllogism: Elk luipaard is een grote kat. Sommige katten zijn panters. Het is waar dat alle huiskatten katachtigen zijn. Elke tijger is een katachtige. Er zijn geen jaguars die geen katachtigen zijn. Er zijn katten die geen leeuwen zijn. Alles wat een kat is, is een kat. Hieruit kan worden afgeleid dat sommige katachtigen geen leeuwen zijn.
english_translated_syllogism: Every leopard is a big cat. Some cats are panthers. It is true that all domestic cats are felines. Every tiger is a feline. There are no jaguars that are not felines. There are cats that are not lions. Everything that is a cat is a cat. From this it can be deduced that some felines are not lions.

original_syllogism: పక్షి ఏదైనా జంతువు. కొన్ని నిర్మాణాలు పక్షులు కావు. ఏదైనా పిల్లి ఒక జీవి. చేపలన్నీ జంతువులే అన్నది నిజం. ఒక్కో కుక్క ఒక్కో జంతువు. పక్షులు అనే ఇళ్లు లేవు. ఏ భవనాలు పక్షులుగా పరిగణించబడవు. జంతువులు లేని కొన్ని భవనాలు ఉన్నాయి.
english_translated_syllogism: A bird is any animal. Some structures are not birds. Any cat is a creature. It is true that all fish are animals. Every dog ​​is a different animal. There are no houses called birds. No buildings are considered birds. There are few buildings without animals.

original_syllogism: Einige Gebäude sind Häuser. Viele Familien leben in Vorstädten. Alle Städte haben eine vielfältige Architektur. Es ist wahr, dass Bauen Planung erfordert. Jeder Wohnblock verfügt über mehrere Etagen. Es gibt einige Häuser, die Wolkenkratzer sind. Deshalb ist jeder einzelne Wolkenkratzer ein Gebäude.
english_translated_syllogism: Some buildings are houses. Many families live in suburbs. All cities have diverse architecture. It's true that building requires planning. Each apartment block has several floors. There are some houses that are skyscrapers. That's why every single skyscraper is a building.

original_syllogism: প্রতিটি টায়ার পনির দিয়ে তৈরি।এটা সত্য যে গাড়ি উড়তে পারে।মোটরচালিত বাহন যা সাইকেল নয়।কোনো যানবাহন চলাচল করেনি।গাড়ি নামে পরিচিত আইটেমগুলির গ্রুপের মধ্যে রয়েছে সাইকেল।এটি অনুসরণ করে যে প্রতিটি একক গাড়ি মোটরচালিত যান নয়।
english_translated_syllogism: Every tire is made of cheese. It is true that cars can fly. Motorized vehicles that are not bicycles. No vehicle has moved. Bicycles are among the group of items known as cars. It follows that every single car is not a motorized vehicle.

original_syllogism: У каждого многоугольника есть углы. В математике можно обнаружить множество закономерностей. Это факт, что геометрия является предметом. Набор квадратов и набор кругов не пересекаются. Некоторые формы трехмерны. Не существует кругов, являющихся геометрическими фигурами. Дело в том, что некоторые геометрические фигуры не являются квадратами.
english_translated_syllogism: Every polygon has angles. In mathematics you can find many patterns. It is a fact that geometry is a subject. A set of squares and a set of circles do not intersect. Some shapes are three-dimensional. There are no circles that are geometric figures. The fact is that some geometric shapes are not squares.

original_syllogism: Toute tulipe est une plante. Il est vrai que tous les chênes sont des plantes. Chaque marguerite est une fleur. Chaque rose est une plante. Certains champignons sont des champignons. Certains champignons ne sont pas des plantes. Il arrive que certains champignons ne soient pas des roses.
english_translated_syllogism: Every tulip is a plant. It is true that all oaks are plants. Each daisy is a flower. Each rose is a plant. Some mushrooms are mushrooms. Some mushrooms are not plants. Some mushrooms may not be roses.

original_syllogism: সমস্ত লাইব্রেরি কক্ষপথে অবস্থিত।পৃষ্ঠা সহ বস্তুর শ্রেণী এবং গ্রহের শ্রেণী সম্পূর্ণরূপে স্বতন্ত্র।পৃথিবীতে কোনো বই পড়া হয়নি।প্রতিটি উপন্যাসই একটি গোলক।কিছু পাতা মাধ্যাকর্ষণ দিয়ে তৈরি।মহাবিশ্বের সব গ্রহই বই।তাই কিছু বই পৃষ্ঠা সহ বস্তু নয় যে ক্ষেত্রে.
english_translated_syllogism: All libraries are located in orbit. The class of objects with pages and the class of planets are completely independent. No book is read on Earth. Every novel is a sphere. Some pages are created by gravity. All planets in the universe are books. So some books are not objects with pages.

original_syllogism: Известно, что в природе существует множество классификаций. Каждый пруд является домом для различных существ. Некоторые виды могут прыгать очень высоко. У многих животных есть позвоночник. Все земноводные начинают жизнь в воде. Каждое существо, являющееся позвоночным, является млекопитающим. Ничто из лягушки не является позвоночным. Должно быть, не существует лягушек, являющихся млекопитающими.
english_translated_syllogism: It is known that there are many classifications in nature. Each pond is home to different creatures. Some species can jump very high. Many animals have a backbone. All amphibians begin life in water. Every creature that is a vertebrate is a mammal. Nothing about a frog is a vertebrate. There must be no frogs that are mammals.

original_syllogism: ప్రతి పిల్లి మార్స్ నుండి రహస్య ఏజెంట్. కొన్ని బొచ్చు పదునైన గాజుతో తయారు చేయబడింది. బైనరీ కోడ్‌లో కుక్కలు మొరుగుతాయన్నది వాస్తవం. అన్ని ఎలుకలు నిజానికి చిన్న ఏనుగులు. ఇప్పటివరకు ఏ జంతువుకు నాలుగు కాళ్లు లేవు. ప్రతి కుక్కకు బొచ్చు ఉంటుంది. ఏదైనా పిల్లికి బొచ్చు ఉంటుంది. అంటే అన్ని పిల్లులు కుక్కలే.
english_translated_syllogism: Every cat is a secret agent from Mars. Some fur is made of sharp glass. It is a fact that dogs bark in binary code. All mice are actually small elephants. No animal has ever had four legs. Every dog ​​has fur. Any cat has fur. That means all cats are dogs.

original_syllogism: Não é verdade que qualquer mamífero seja um inseto. Cada abelha produz leite em vez de mel. Todos os insetos são do tamanho de aviões. Nenhum animal jamais foi pequeno. Alguns mamíferos têm seis pernas e antenas. Existem algumas abelhas que são insetos. Isso significa que algumas abelhas são mamíferos.
english_translated_syllogism: It is not true that any mammal is an insect. Each bee produces milk instead of honey. All insects are the size of airplanes. No animal has ever been small. Some mammals have six legs and antennae. There are some bees that are insects. This means that some bees are mammals.

original_syllogism: Jede Katze ist ein Tier. Jedes einzelne Haustier lebt tausend Jahre. In der Geschichte hat noch nie eine Katze eine Maus gejagt. Alle Tiere sprechen fließend Englisch. Es gibt eine Reihe von Hunden, die Tiere sind. Daraus folgt, dass jeder einzelne Hund eine Katze ist.
english_translated_syllogism: Every cat is an animal. Every single pet lives for a thousand years. In history, no cat has ever hunted a mouse. All animals speak English fluently. There are a number of dogs that are animals. It follows that every single dog is a cat.

original_syllogism: ఏనుగులన్నీ పర్సులో పెట్టుకునేంత చిన్నవి. టెర్రియర్ అయిన ప్రతిదీ కుక్క. ప్రతి తిమింగలం మెయిల్‌మ్యాన్‌ని చూసి మొరిగేది. టెర్రియర్ కంటే పెద్ద క్షీరదం లేదు. కుక్కలన్నీ క్షీరదాలు. అందువల్ల, ప్రతి క్షీరదం ఒక టెర్రియర్.
english_translated_syllogism: All elephants are small enough to fit in a purse. A dog is everything a terrier is. Every whale barks at the mailman. There is no larger mammal than the terrier. All dogs are mammals. Therefore, every mammal is a terrier.

original_syllogism: ఏదైనా ఎలుగుబంటికి బొచ్చు ఉంటుంది. కుక్కలంటే బల్లులు లేవు. పాములన్నీ సరీసృపాలే అన్నది నిజం. కుక్క అయిన ఏ జంతువు అయినా బొచ్చు ఉన్న జీవి. కొన్ని జంతువులు కుక్కలు కావు. ప్రతి పిల్లి బొచ్చుతో కూడిన జీవి. కుక్క అనే ఒక్క సరీసృపం కూడా లేదు. ఏ సరీసృపాలు బొచ్చు ఉన్న జీవి కాదని ఇది అనుసరిస్తుంది.
english_translated_syllogism: Any bear has fur. Dogs do not have lizards. It is true that all snakes are reptiles. Any animal that is a dog is a creature with fur. Some animals are not dogs. Every cat is a furry creature. There is not even a single reptile called a dog. It follows that no reptile is a furry creature.

original_syllogism: Existem alguns poetas que são escritores. Alguns romances tornam-se best-sellers internacionais. Toda literatura reflete a cultura de sua época. Muitos livros são publicados todos os anos. Tudo o que é escritor também é autor. Portanto, deve ser verdade que alguns autores são poetas.
english_translated_syllogism: There are some poets who are writers. Some novels become international bestsellers. All literature reflects the culture of its time. Many books are published every year. Everything that is a writer is also an author. Therefore, it must be true that some authors are poets.

original_syllogism: చాలా క్యాంపస్‌లలో అధ్యయనం కోసం లైబ్రరీలు ఉన్నాయి. చదువు అనేది జీవితకాల ప్రయాణం అన్నది నిజం. ప్రొఫెసర్ ఎప్పుడూ విద్యార్థి కాదు. అన్ని విశ్వవిద్యాలయాలు పరిశోధనలు నిర్వహిస్తున్నాయి. ప్రతి పండితుడు వారి రంగానికి సహకరిస్తారు. ఆచార్యులుగా ఉన్నవారిలో ఒక వర్గం విద్యావేత్తలు. కొంతమంది విద్యావేత్తలు విద్యార్థులు కాదని దీనిని బట్టి ఊహించవచ్చు.
english_translated_syllogism: Most campuses have libraries for study. It is true that education is a lifelong journey. A professor is never a student. All universities are conducting research. Every scholar contributes to their field. A category of professors are academicians. This suggests that some academics are not students.

original_syllogism: Все школы посещают скалы. Ничто из того, что является человеком, не является неживым существом. Ни один учитель не является живым человеком. Некоторые карандаши на самом деле являются змеями. Это факт, что обучение запрещено. В группу студентов входят некоторые неживые существа. Должно быть так, что каждый студент не является человеком.
english_translated_syllogism: All schools visit the rocks. Nothing that is human is non-living. No teacher is a living person. Some pencils are actually snakes. It is a fact that training is prohibited. The group of students includes some non-living beings. It must be the case that every student is not human.

original_syllogism: Ci sono alcuni mammiferi che sono cavalli. Qualsiasi gatto è un mammifero. Alcuni mammiferi sono conigli. Ogni singolo pesce rosso è un animale domestico. Ogni singolo cane è un mammifero. È vero che tutti i criceti sono animali domestici. Tutto ciò che è un animale domestico è un mammifero. Un certo numero di animali domestici sono cani.
english_translated_syllogism: There are some mammals that are horses. Any cat is a mammal. Some mammals are rabbits. Every single goldfish is a pet. Every single dog is a mammal. It's true that all hamsters are pets. Anything that is a pet is a mammal. A number of pets are dogs.

original_syllogism: 事实是，所有的葡萄都是石头。没有水果是蔬菜。每一根香蕉都是一块牛排。没有可以食用的樱桃。确实，没有一种蔬菜是苹果。由此可见，没有苹果是水果。
english_translated_syllogism: The truth is, all grapes are stones. No fruit is a vegetable. Every banana is a steak. There are no edible cherries. Indeed, no vegetable is an apple. It follows that no apple is a fruit.

original_syllogism: Nenhuma cadeira jamais foi sentada. Todo vidro é mais forte que o aço. Cada vaso salta quando atinge o chão. Não há itens quebráveis ​​que sejam móveis. É verdade que nada pode ser quebrado. Algumas cadeiras são, na verdade, coisas quebráveis. Conseqüentemente, algumas cadeiras não são móveis.
english_translated_syllogism: No chair was ever sat on. All glass is stronger than steel. Each vase bounces when it hits the floor. There are no breakable items that are movable. It is true that nothing can be broken. Some chairs are actually breakable things. Consequently, some chairs are not furniture.

original_syllogism: Некоторые черепахи — существа, способные летать. Каждая ящерица является млекопитающим. Дело в том, что все лягушки являются рептилиями. Хладнокровных рептилий не существует. Все, что является змеей, является птицей. Это факт, что все змеи являются рептилиями. Отсюда следует, что некоторые рептилии являются птицами.
english_translated_syllogism: Some turtles are creatures that can fly. Every lizard is a mammal. The fact is that all frogs are reptiles. There are no cold-blooded reptiles. Everything that is a snake is a bird. It is a fact that all snakes are reptiles. It follows that some reptiles are birds.

original_syllogism: কিছু প্রজাতি বড় উপনিবেশে বাস করে।প্রতিটি বাস্তুতন্ত্রে বিভিন্ন জীব রয়েছে।অনেক ছোট প্রাণী মাটিতে হামাগুড়ি দেয়।সমস্ত মেরুদণ্ড হাড় বা তরুণাস্থি দিয়ে তৈরি।এটা সত্য যে জীববিদ্যা শারীরস্থান অধ্যয়ন করে।পোকা বলা যায় না এমন কিছুই মেরুদণ্ডী নয়।পোকামাকড়ের একটি নির্দিষ্ট অংশ হল পিঁপড়া।এটি অনুসরণ করে যে কিছু পিঁপড়া মেরুদণ্ডী নয়।
english_translated_syllogism: Some species live in large colonies. Every ecosystem contains different organisms. Many small animals crawl on the ground. All vertebrates are made of bones or cartilage. It is true that biology studies anatomy. Nothing that can be called an insect is a vertebrate. A specific group of insects is ants. It follows that some ants are not vertebrates.

original_syllogism: É sabido que as estradas são feitas de marshmallow. Todo carro é feito de queijo macio. Todas as bicicletas são movidas por motores a jato. Todo carro tem rodas. Nenhum veículo pode se mover mais rápido que um caracol. Toda a categoria de bicicletas consiste em coisas com rodas. Bicicletas e carros são da mesma categoria.
english_translated_syllogism: It is known that roads are made of marshmallows. Every car is made of soft cheese. All bikes are powered by jet engines. Every car has wheels. No vehicle can move faster than a snail. The entire bicycle category consists of things with wheels. Bicycles and cars are in the same category.

original_syllogism: Tout chien est un reptile. Il n’existe pas de lions qui soient des mammifères. Chaque baleine a des plumes. Chaque mammifère a des poils. C'est un fait que tous les singes sont des poissons. Certains ours sont des oiseaux. Il est également vrai que chaque chat a des poils. Il existe donc des chats qui ne sont pas des mammifères.
english_translated_syllogism: Every dog ​​is a reptile. There are no lions that are mammals. Every whale has feathers. Every mammal has hair. It is a fact that all monkeys are fish. Some bears are birds. It is also true that every cat has hair. So there are cats that are not mammals.

original_syllogism: Elke vis is een mineraal. Het is een feit dat alle vogels stenen zijn. Er zijn geen walvissen die levende wezens zijn. Elke hond is een groente. Alles wat een zoogdier is, is een dier. Elke kat is een zoogdier. Het is zo dat geen enkele kat een dier is.
english_translated_syllogism: Every fish is a mineral. The fact is that all birds are stones. There are no whales that are living things. Every dog ​​is a vegetable. Everything that is a mammal is an animal. Every cat is a mammal. The fact is that no cat is an animal.

original_syllogism: Ogni singolo elefante è capace di volare. Non esistono ippopotami che non sappiano volare. Qualsiasi creatura che sia un cane può volare. Tutto ciò che è un animale è capace di volare. Ogni singolo insetto è un animale. Non esistono insetti che non sappiano volare.
english_translated_syllogism: Every single elephant is capable of flight. There are no hippos that can't fly. Any creature that is a dog can fly. Anything that is an animal is capable of flight. Every single insect is an animal. There are no insects that cannot fly.

original_syllogism: ప్రతి ఒక్క రాయి ఒక వాయువు. ఘనమైన పర్వతాలు లేవు. కొన్ని నీరు ఒక రకమైన పొడి ఇసుక. ప్రతి రాయి ఘనమైనదనేది నిజం. రసాలన్నీ ఘన శిలలే అన్నది వాస్తవం. ఏదైనా గులకరాయి స్వచ్ఛమైన గాలితో తయారు చేయబడింది. శిలలన్నీ ద్రవరూపాలు. అంటే కొన్ని ద్రవాలు ఘనపదార్థాలు.
english_translated_syllogism: Every stone is a gas. There are no solid mountains. Some water is a type of dry sand. It is true that every stone is solid. It is a fact that all rasas are solid rocks. Any pebble is made of fresh air. All rocks are liquids. That means some liquids are solids.

original_syllogism: Alle mensen zijn zonder twijfel levende wezens. De meeste soorten planten zich voort. Alle organismen hebben energie nodig. Elk biologisch systeem is complex. Sommige wezens leven in de zee. Ieder mens is ook een dier. Daarom moeten alle dieren levende wezens zijn.
english_translated_syllogism: All humans are undoubtedly living beings. Most species reproduce. All organisms need energy. Every biological system is complex. Some creatures live in the sea. Every person is also an animal. Therefore, all animals must be living beings.

original_syllogism: 确实，灯实际上是水果。没有表是对象。每张沙发都可以在房间里飞来飞去。所有的椅子都是活物。没有一个房间有床。有些桌子是由冰水制成的。每一张桌子都是一件家具。有些家具不能成为物体。
english_translated_syllogism: Indeed, the lamps are actually fruits. No table is an object. Each sofa can fly around the room. All chairs are living creatures. None of the rooms have beds. Some tables are made of ice water. Every table is a piece of furniture. Some furniture cannot become objects.

original_syllogism: Rien de ce qui est une plante ne peut être considéré comme un reptile. Toute fleur est une plante. Chaque lézard est un reptile. Certains animaux sont des reptiles. Il n’existe pas d’herbes qui soient des reptiles. Il est vrai que tous les buissons sont des plantes. Tout ce qui est un arbre est, sans exception, une plante. Il s’ensuit donc qu’il n’y a pas d’arbres qui soient des reptiles.
english_translated_syllogism: Nothing that is a plant can be considered a reptile. Every flower is a plant. Every lizard is a reptile. Some animals are reptiles. There are no herbs that are reptiles. It is true that all bushes are plants. Everything that is a tree is, without exception, a plant. It follows therefore that there are no trees which are reptiles.

original_syllogism: సింహాలను పెద్ద పిల్లులుగా పిలుస్తారనేది నిజం. ప్రతి పిల్లి జాతికి అద్భుతమైన రాత్రి దృష్టి ఉంటుంది. పెంపుడు కుక్కలన్నీ తోడేళ్ళకు సంబంధించినవి. అనేక అడవి పిల్లులు సవన్నాలో వేటాడతాయి. ఒక్కొక్క కుక్క కుక్కలే. కొన్ని జంతువులు మొరగడం ద్వారా కమ్యూనికేట్ చేస్తాయి. పిల్లి జాతి కుక్కలు లేవు. అందువల్ల, కుక్కల వంటి పిల్లి జాతులు లేవు.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that lions are called big cats. Every feline has excellent night vision. All domestic dogs are related to wolves. Many wild cats hunt in the savannah. Every dog ​​is a dog. Some animals communicate by barking. No felines. Therefore, there are no felines like dogs.

original_syllogism: Paka zote zinaweza kupumua chini ya maji kwa muda usiojulikana. Kila ndege mmoja ana mapezi badala ya mabawa. Baadhi ya viumbe ambavyo vina gill ni samaki. Hakuna mnyama anayepumua hewa kwenye ardhi. Ni ukweli kwamba wanadamu wana gill kwenye shingo zao. Mbwa wengine huishi chini ya bahari. Vitu vyote ambavyo ni samaki ni wanyama. Kwa hivyo, kila mnyama mmoja ni kiumbe aliye na gill.
english_translated_syllogism: All cats can breathe underwater indefinitely. Every single bird has fins instead of wings. Some organisms that have gills are fish. No animal breathes air on earth. It is a fact that humans have gills on their necks. Some dogs live under the sea. All things that are fish are animals. Therefore, every single animal is a creature with gills.

original_syllogism: Alcuni grattacieli non sono uccelli. È vero che tutti gli orsi sono animali. Qualsiasi leone è una creatura. Tutto ciò che è un uccello è un animale. Non ci sono ponti che siano uccelli. Ogni singola tigre è un animale. L'insieme degli edifici non contiene uccelli. Ci sono alcuni edifici che non sono animali.
english_translated_syllogism: Some skyscrapers are not birds. It is true that all bears are animals. Any lion is a creature. Anything that is a bird is an animal. There are no bridges that are birds. Every single tiger is an animal. The buildings as a whole contain no birds. There are some buildings that are not animals.

original_syllogism: చాలా కోతులు ఉష్ణమండల వాతావరణంలో నివసిస్తాయి. ప్రతి చింపాంజీ సాధనాలను ఉపయోగించగల సామర్థ్యాన్ని కలిగి ఉంటుంది. మానవుడు ఏదైనా ఒక క్షీరదం. కొన్ని క్షీరదాలు సముద్రంలో నివసిస్తాయి. అన్ని కోతులు ప్రజలతో జన్యు సారూప్యతలను పంచుకుంటాయి. జీవశాస్త్రం జాతులను వర్గీకరిస్తుంది అనేది వాస్తవం. ప్రైమేట్స్ అయిన మానవులు ఉన్నారు. అన్ని ప్రైమేట్స్ క్షీరదాలు అని అనుసరించాలి.
english_translated_syllogism: Most monkeys live in tropical climates. Every chimpanzee is capable of using tools. Any human being is a mammal. Some mammals live in the sea. All monkeys share genetic similarities with humans. It is a fact that biology classifies species. There are humans who are primates. It follows that all primates are mammals.

original_syllogism: Kila mbwa ni mamalia. Tembo wote ni wadudu wadogo. Kila farasi ni aina ya samaki. Paka zingine zina miguu nane. Ni ukweli kwamba buibui ni mamalia. Mbwa zote zina miguu nne. Kwa hivyo, wanyama wote ambao wana miguu nne lazima iwe mbwa.
english_translated_syllogism: Every dog ​​is a mammal. All elephants are small insects. Every horse is a type of fish. Some cats have eight legs. It is a fact that spiders are mammals. All dogs have four legs. Therefore, all animals that have four legs must be dogs.

original_syllogism: Это правда, что ногти сделаны из воды. Все молотки сделаны из шипучей соды. Ни один строитель не использует надежное оборудование. Каждый ящик для инструментов наполнен фруктовым соком. Несколько жидкостей - отвертки. Все, что является отвертками, является инструментом. Дело в том, что некоторые инструменты являются жидкостями.
english_translated_syllogism: It's true that nails are made of water. All hammers are made from fizzy soda. No builder uses reliable equipment. Each toolbox is filled with fruit juice. Several liquids - screwdrivers. Anything that is a screwdriver is a tool. The fact is that some tools are liquids.

original_syllogism: Все привычки формируются через повторение. Регулярные занятия спортом полезны для здоровья. Обычно занятия в спортзале кажутся сложными. Не бывает сложных привычек, которые одновременно были бы простыми. Ряд упражнений – это сложные привычки. Таким образом, часть упражнений являются простыми.
english_translated_syllogism: All habits are formed through repetition. Regular exercise is good for your health. Working out at the gym usually seems difficult. There are no complex habits that are also simple. A number of exercises are complex habits. Thus, some of the exercises are simple.

original_syllogism: Alguns animais não são peixes. Nada que seja peixe é mamífero terrestre. Qualquer baleia é uma criatura marinha. Não existem tubarões que sejam mamíferos terrestres. Todas as coisas que são trutas são peixes. Segue-se necessariamente que algumas coisas que são trutas não são mamíferos terrestres.
english_translated_syllogism: Some animals are not fish. Nothing that is a fish is a land mammal. Any whale is a marine creature. There are no sharks that are land mammals. All things that are trout are fish. It necessarily follows that some things that are trout are not land mammals.

original_syllogism: Все, что является млекопитающим, является животным. Некоторые млекопитающие не являются животными. Не существует овец, которые были бы существами. Это правда, что все свиньи — облака. Каждая кошка – млекопитающее. Дело в том, что ни одна кошка не является животным.
english_translated_syllogism: Everything that is a mammal is an animal. Some mammals are not animals. There are no sheep that are creatures. It's true that all pigs are clouds. Every cat is a mammal. The fact is that no cat is an animal.

original_syllogism: কিছু কম্পিউটার আছে যেগুলো ইলেকট্রনিক্স।প্রতিটি ল্যাপটপে একটি স্ক্রিন এবং একটি কীবোর্ড রয়েছে।এটি একটি সত্য যে ইন্টারনেট বিশ্বকে সংযুক্ত করে।কিছু ডিভাইস ব্যাটারি পাওয়ারে চলে।সমস্ত স্মার্টফোনই পোর্টেবল যোগাযোগের সরঞ্জাম।বেশিরভাগ অফিস প্রতিদিন প্রযুক্তির উপর নির্ভর করে।ইলেকট্রনিক সবকিছুই একটি যন্ত্র।ফলে কিছু ডিভাইস কম্পিউটার।
english_translated_syllogism: There are some computers that are electronics. Every laptop has a screen and a keyboard. It is a fact that the Internet connects the world. Some devices run on battery power. All smartphones are portable communication tools. Most offices rely on technology every day. Everything electronic is a device. Consequently some devices are computers.

original_syllogism: ప్రతి ఒక్క నక్షత్రం ఆకాశంలో ఒక చిన్న బల్బు. ఏ వాహనానికీ చక్రాలు లేవు. ఒక్కో మేఘం ఒక్కో వాహనం. కొన్ని మేఘాలు ఘన ఇటుకతో తయారు చేయబడ్డాయి. నక్షత్రాలైన మేఘాలు లేవు. అందువల్ల, ప్రతి ఒక్క నక్షత్రం వాహనం.
english_translated_syllogism: Each individual star is a small bulb in the sky. No vehicle has wheels. Each cloud is a different vehicle. Some clouds are made of solid brick. No starry clouds. Therefore, each star is a vehicle.

original_syllogism: Tout objet qui est une voiture est un véhicule. Il n’y a pas de fourgonnettes qui ne soient pas des véhicules. Chaque camion est un type de véhicule. Tout coupé est un type de voiture. Toutes les berlines sont, sans exception, des voitures. Il n’existe donc pas de berlines qui ne soient pas des véhicules.
english_translated_syllogism: Any object that is a car is a vehicle. There are no vans that are not vehicles. Each truck is a type of vehicle. Every coupe is a type of car. All sedans are, without exception, cars. There are therefore no sedans that are not vehicles.

original_syllogism: Het is zo dat vaste stoffen een vaste vorm behouden. Vloeibare voorwerpen zijn nooit vaste stoffen. Alle ijsblokjes smelten als ze in de zon liggen. Sommige toestanden van materie omvatten gas en plasma. Alle items die als ijsblokjes worden beschouwd, zijn vaste stoffen. De implicatie is dat een deel van de ijsblokjes geen vloeistoffen zijn.
english_translated_syllogism: It is true that solids retain a fixed shape. Liquid objects are never solids. All ice cubes melt when left in the sun. Some states of matter include gas and plasma. All items considered ice cubes are solids. The implication is that some of the ice cubes are not liquids.

original_syllogism: Certaines rivières sont des plans d'eau. Il est vrai que l'Atlantique est un océan. Chaque océan est une masse d’eau. Il n’y a pas d’étangs qui ne soient pas des plans d’eau. Tout ce qui constitue l'océan Pacifique est un océan. Il est vrai qu’une partie de l’océan Pacifique est une masse d’eau.
english_translated_syllogism: Some rivers are bodies of water. It is true that the Atlantic is an ocean. Each ocean is a body of water. There are no ponds that are not bodies of water. Everything that makes up the Pacific Ocean is an ocean. It is true that part of the Pacific Ocean is a body of water.

original_syllogism: Kein Schüler hat jemals ein Buch geöffnet. Alles und jedes, was ein Mentor ist, ist ein Lehrer. Es ist eine Tatsache, dass Lehrer nie die Antwort wissen. Alle Schulen werden von Kleinkindern geleitet. Einige Prüfungen werden mit unsichtbarer Tinte geschrieben. Es gibt Mentoren, die Studierende sind. Daraus muss folgen, dass alle Schüler Lehrer sind.
english_translated_syllogism: No student has ever opened a book. Anything and everything a mentor is a teacher. It's a fact that teachers never know the answer. All schools are run by young children. Some exams are written in invisible ink. There are mentors who are students. It must follow that all students are teachers.

original_syllogism: У каждого человека три головы и пять рук. Это тот случай, когда книги съедают студентов, которые их читают. Ни один человек никогда не учился читать или писать. Каждый человек – человек. Некоторые студенты на самом деле являются инопланетными роботами. По крайней мере один студент не человек. Есть по крайней мере один студент, который не является человеком.
english_translated_syllogism: Each person has three heads and five arms. This is a case where books eat the students who read them. No man has ever learned to read or write. Every person is a person. Some students are actually alien robots. At least one student is not human. There is at least one student who is not human.

original_syllogism: Certaines créatures ne sont pas des mammifères. Tous les chiens sont des mammifères. Il est vrai que tous les chevaux sont des mammifères. Chaque chat est un mammifère. Tout animal qui est une baleine est un mammifère. Certains animaux ne sont pas des chiens. Il s’ensuit que certains animaux ne sont pas des mammifères.
