english_translated_syllogism: Some creatures are not mammals. All dogs are mammals. It is true that all horses are mammals. Every cat is a mammal. Any animal that is a whale is a mammal. Some animals are not dogs. It follows that some animals are not mammals.

original_syllogism: Algunos vertebrados son criaturas que viven en el océano. Es un hecho que todos los petirrojos son animales voladores. Todo lo que es un gorrión es un pájaro. Hay algunas aves que no pueden volar. Cualquier animal que sea halcón es un vertebrado. Cada criatura que es un pájaro es un vertebrado. Debe darse el caso de que algunos vertebrados sean gorriones.
english_translated_syllogism: Some vertebrates are creatures that live in the ocean. It is a fact that all robins are flying animals. Everything that is a sparrow is a bird. There are some birds that cannot fly. Any animal that is a falcon is a vertebrate. Every creature that is a bird is a vertebrate. It must be the case that some vertebrates are sparrows.

original_syllogism: Todos los aviones nadan bajo el agua como peces. Cada estrella es en realidad un malvavisco gigante. Todas y cada una de las nubes son un avión. Algunos vehículos se cultivan en jardines. No hay nubes que sean estrellas. Por tanto, no existen vehículos que sean aviones.
english_translated_syllogism: All planes swim underwater like fish. Each star is actually a giant marshmallow. Each and every cloud is an airplane. Some vegetables are grown in gardens. There are no clouds that are stars. Therefore, there are no vehicles that are airplanes.

original_syllogism: Jede einzelne Banane ist ein Star. Alles, was eine Frucht ist, ist ein Planet. Manche Birnen sind Monde. Es gibt keine Kirschen, die keine Kometen sind. Kein Planet ist ein Apfel. Daraus lässt sich schließen, dass manche Äpfel keine Früchte sind.
english_translated_syllogism: Every single banana is a star. Everything that is a fruit is a planet. Some bulbs are moons. There are no cherries that are not comets. No planet is an apple. This suggests that some apples are not fruits.

original_syllogism: Cada planeta tiene forma de pirámide. El sol gira alrededor de la tierra cada hora. Todas las galaxias son lo suficientemente pequeñas como para caber en un bolsillo. Nada de lo que es una estrella es un cuerpo celeste. Algunas estrellas están hechas de hielo y nieve. Cada planeta es un cuerpo celeste. De esto se deduce que todos los planetas son estrellas.
english_translated_syllogism: Each planet is shaped like a pyramid. The sun rotates around the earth every hour. All galaxies are small enough to fit in a pocket. Nothing that is a star is a celestial body. Some stars are made of ice and snow. Each planet is a celestial body. From this it follows that all planets are stars.

original_syllogism: Todos os cães pertencem à família dos caninos. Todo gato possui garras retráteis para escalar. A categoria dos gatos é totalmente separada da categoria dos animais que latem. Existem muitas raças de cães encontradas em todo o mundo. Alguns animais são comumente mantidos como animais domésticos. É verdade que os mamíferos são criaturas de sangue quente. Cada membro da família canina é um animal que late. Nenhum cão pode ser encontrado dentro do grupo de gatos.
english_translated_syllogism: All dogs belong to the canine family. Every cat has retractable claws for climbing. The category of cats is completely separate from the category of animals that bark. There are many dog ​​breeds found throughout the world. Some animals are commonly kept as pets. It is true that mammals are warm-blooded creatures. Every member of the canine family is a barking animal. No dogs can be found within the group of cats.

original_syllogism: Iets dat een huis is, kan geen gebouw zijn. Geen enkele stad heeft enige structuur. Het is waar dat mensen in wolken leven. Alle appartementen zijn grotten in de grond. Sommige muren zijn onzichtbaar voor het oog. Er bestaan ​​dingen die huizen zijn en ook woningen. Hieruit weten we zeker dat sommige woningen geen gebouwen zijn.
english_translated_syllogism: Something that is a house cannot be a building. No city has any structure. It is true that people live in clouds. All apartments are caves in the ground. Some walls are invisible to the eye. There exist things that are houses and also dwellings. From this we know for sure that some homes are not buildings.

original_syllogism: Chaque parc possède des espèces de plantes différentes. Certains climats abritent des forêts à feuilles persistantes. Toutes les forêts changent de couleur en automne. De nombreuses feuilles tombent au sol en hiver. Parmi les érables, il y en a qui sont à feuilles caduques. Chaque érable est, par définition, un arbre. Il se peut que certains arbres soient à feuilles caduques.
english_translated_syllogism: Each park has different species of plants. Some climates are home to evergreen forests. All forests change color in autumn. Many leaves fall to the ground in winter. Among maples, there are some that are deciduous. Each maple is, by definition, a tree. Some trees may be deciduous.

original_syllogism: Wanyama wengi huhifadhiwa na wanadamu kama wenzi. Paka zingine zinapendelea kulala kwa masaa mengi kwa siku. Kila mifugo huchukua aina anuwai ya kipenzi. Kila mbwa mmoja ana manyoya. Ni kweli kwamba mbwa mara nyingi huitwa rafiki bora wa mwanadamu. Angalau paka moja haina manyoya. Angalau paka moja sio mbwa.
english_translated_syllogism: Many animals are kept by humans as companions. Some cats prefer to sleep for many hours a day. Each breed takes a different type of pet. Every single dog has fur. It is true that dogs are often called man's best friend. At least one cat is hairless. At least one cat is not a dog.

original_syllogism: ప్రతి కుక్క ఎగిరే జీవి. ఏదైనా పిల్లి ఫ్లైట్ చేయగలదు. ప్రతి ఒక్క పక్షి ఎగిరే జీవి. కొన్ని చేపలు ఎగిరే జీవులు. పక్షులు కొన్ని జంతువులు ఉన్నాయి. జంతువులన్నీ ఎగిరే జీవులే అని తేల్చాలి.
english_translated_syllogism: Every dog ​​is a flying creature. Any cat can fly. Every single bird is a flying creature. Some fish are flying creatures. Birds are some animals. It should be concluded that all animals are flying creatures.

original_syllogism: ইয়াংজি চীনের একটি প্রধান নদী।কিছু নদী প্রশান্ত মহাসাগরে মিশেছে।এশিয়ার প্রতিটি নদীই দীর্ঘ।প্রতিটি মানচিত্রে এশিয়ার দেশগুলোর সীমানা দেখানো হয়েছে।সমস্ত মহাদেশের বিভিন্ন ভৌগোলিক বৈশিষ্ট্য রয়েছে।কিছু চীনা নদী আছে যেগুলো এশিয়ান নদী।ফলস্বরূপ, কিছু চীনা নদী দীর্ঘ।
english_translated_syllogism: The Yangtze is a major river in China. Some rivers flow into the Pacific Ocean. Every river in Asia is long. Every map shows the borders of Asian countries. All continents have different geographical features. There are some Chinese rivers that are Asian rivers. Consequently, some Chinese rivers are long.

original_syllogism: Alcuni tappeti sono fatti di acqua liquida. Ogni tavolo racchiude sentimenti e pensieri. Non ci sono mobili che siano piante. Tutti i divani sono animali vivi. Nessuna pianta è una sedia. È vero che una parte delle sedie non è un mobile.
english_translated_syllogism: Some carpets are made of liquid water. Each table contains feelings and thoughts. There are no pieces of furniture that are plants. All sofas are live animals. No plant is a chair. It is true that some of the chairs are not furniture.

original_syllogism: Algumas famílias têm mais de um animal de estimação. Uma parte dos mamíferos também são animais de estimação. Todo veterinário trata animais doentes. É fato que os animais precisam de cuidados. Muitas pessoas adotam animais de abrigos. Todos os lobos são ancestrais selvagens dos cães. Sabe-se que vários cães são mamíferos. A partir disso podemos concluir que nem todos os cães são animais de estimação.
english_translated_syllogism: Some families have more than one pet. Some mammals are also pets. Every veterinarian treats sick animals. It is a fact that animals need care. Many people adopt animals from shelters. All wolves are wild ancestors of dogs. It is known that several dogs are mammals. From this we can conclude that not all dogs are pets.

original_syllogism: Jeder einzelne Dieb ist ein Heiliger. Alles, was ein Politiker ist, ist ehrlich. Manche Räuber sind tugendhafte Menschen. Es gibt keine korrupten Beamten, die Kriminelle sind. Niemand, der ehrlich ist, ist ein Krimineller. Daraus muss folgen, dass kein Krimineller ein Politiker ist.
english_translated_syllogism: Every single thief is a saint. All a politician is is honesty. Some robbers are virtuous people. There are no corrupt officials who are criminals. No one who is honest is a criminal. It must follow that no criminal is a politician.

original_syllogism: Pets zingine ni mamalia. Kila mamalia ni mnyama. Kila mbwa mwitu ni mnyama. Kuna wanyama wachache ambao sio mbwa. Paka yoyote ni mamalia. Ni kesi kwamba farasi wote ni wanyama. Ni kweli kwamba mbwa wengine ni mamalia. Kwa hivyo, kila mbwa ni mnyama.
english_translated_syllogism: Other pets are mammals. Every mammal is an animal. Every wolf is an animal. There are few animals that are not dogs. Any cat is a mammal. It is the case that all horses are animals. It is true that some dogs are mammals. Therefore, every dog ​​is an animal.

original_syllogism: Algunas aves son cosas que pueden volar. Es cierto que algunas cosas, que son pájaros, no son pingüinos. No hay peces que no sean vertebrados. Cualquier águila es un pájaro. Todo lo que es un pájaro es un vertebrado. Esto lleva a la conclusión de que algunos vertebrados no son pingüinos.
english_translated_syllogism: Some birds are things that can fly. It is true that some things, which are birds, are not penguins. There are no fish that are not vertebrates. Any eagle is a bird. Everything that is a bird is a vertebrate. This leads to the conclusion that some vertebrates are not penguins.

original_syllogism: Alguns mamíferos não são cães. É verdade que todos os animais de estimação são animais. Qualquer lobo é um canino. Não existem gatos que sejam cães. É certo que todo cachorro é um mamífero. Cada raposa é um mamífero. Também é verdade que todos os caninos são cães. Nesta base, foi afirmado que todos os caninos são mamíferos.
english_translated_syllogism: Some mammals are not dogs. It's true that all pets are animals. Any wolf is a canine. There are no cats that are dogs. It is true that every dog ​​is a mammal. Every fox is a mammal. It is also true that all canines are dogs. On this basis, it has been asserted that all canines are mammals.

original_syllogism: Hay algunos alimentos que no son vegetales. Cada zanahoria es un alimento. Es cierto que toda lechuga es una verdura. Todo lo que sea pepino también es alimento. Cualquier tomate es una verdura. Cada pepino es una verdura. Podemos inferir que algunas verduras son alimentos.
english_translated_syllogism: There are some foods that are not vegetables. Each carrot is a food. It is true that all lettuce is a vegetable. Everything that is cucumber is also food. Any tomato is a vegetable. Every cucumber is a vegetable. We can infer that some vegetables are foods.

original_syllogism: Cualquier caballo es un tipo de vegetal. Es cierto que algunas criaturas clasificadas como perros no son animales. Es un hecho que todas las vacas son minerales. Cada gato es un robot. Algunos cerdos están hechos de plástico. No existen ovejas que sean seres vivos. También es cierto que toda criatura que sea un perro es un mamífero. De esto podemos deducir lógicamente que algunas criaturas que son mamíferos no son animales.
english_translated_syllogism: Any horse is a type of vegetable. It is true that some creatures classified as dogs are not animals. It is a fact that all cows are minerals. Every cat is a robot. Some pigs are made of plastic. There are no sheep that are living beings. It is also true that any creature that is a dog is a mammal. From this we can logically deduce that some creatures that are mammals are not animals.

original_syllogism: Wanyama wote hufanywa kwa sehemu za robotic. Hakuna kitu kimoja ambacho ni mbwa ambayo pia ni mamalia. Ni kweli kwamba manyoya yametengenezwa na nyasi kijani. Baadhi ya paka hupiga zaidi kuliko mbwa. Kabisa hakuna paka ni mbwa. Hii inaonyesha kuwa paka zingine sio mamalia.
english_translated_syllogism: All animals are made of robotic parts. There is no single thing that is a dog that is also a mammal. It is true that feathers are made of green grass. Some cats bite more than dogs. Absolutely no cats are dogs. This shows that some cats are not mammals.

original_syllogism: Tous les océans couvrent une grande partie de la Terre. Tout être vivant a besoin d’hydratation. C’est un fait que les rivières se jettent dans la mer. Toute eau est un fluide. Certaines formes d’eau sont liquides. Il s’ensuit nécessairement que certains liquides sont des fluides.
english_translated_syllogism: All oceans cover a large part of the Earth. Every living thing needs hydration. It is a fact that rivers flow into the sea. All water is a fluid. Some forms of water are liquid. It necessarily follows that some liquids are fluids.

original_syllogism: 没有滑板是汽车。任何福特汽车都是汽车。任何摩托车都是两轮车辆。确实，所有丰田汽车都是汽车。有些车辆不是汽车。每一辆雪佛兰都是一辆汽车。没有自行车是汽车。任何自行车都不可能是福特的。
english_translated_syllogism: No skateboard is a car. Any Ford is a car. Any motorcycle is a two-wheeled vehicle. Indeed, all Toyota vehicles are cars. Some vehicles are not cars. Every Chevrolet is a car. No bike is a car. No bike can be a Ford.

original_syllogism: Cada montaña está hecha de gelatina. Es cierto que la gente respira arena en lugar de aire. Todas y cada una de las piedras son un líquido. Nunca se ha encontrado ninguna piedra en el suelo. Todas las piedras son sustancias respirables. Por tanto, se da el caso de que algunas sustancias respirables sean líquidas.
english_translated_syllogism: Each mountain is made of gelatin. It is true that people breathe sand instead of air. Each and every stone is a liquid. No stone has ever been found in the ground. All stones are respirable substances. Therefore, it is the case that some respirable substances are liquids.

original_syllogism: Ni ukweli kwamba wanyama hubadilika. Kila zoo hujali wanyama wa porini. Mashamba yote yana mifugo. Pets nyingi huishi ndani na wanadamu. Sio kweli kwamba wanyama wowote wa kupatikana ni paka. Sehemu ya paka ni wanyama wa nyumbani. Kuna wanyama wengine ambao sio wanyama wa porini.
english_translated_syllogism: It is a fact that animals change. Every zoo cares about wild animals. All farms have livestock. Many pets live inside with humans. It is not true that any animals found are cats. Part of cats are domestic animals. There are other animals that are not wild animals.

original_syllogism: Não há pombos que põem ovos. Cada robin dá à luz jovens vivos. Cada ave é um mamífero. É fato que todos os falcões têm pêlo. Qualquer águia é um tipo de peixe. Qualquer coisa que seja um pardal é um pássaro. Pode-se concluir que todo pardal é um mamífero.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no pigeons that lay eggs. Each robin gives birth to live young. Every bird is a mammal. It is a fact that all falcons have fur. Any eagle is a type of fish. Anything that is a sparrow is a bird. It can be concluded that every sparrow is a mammal.

original_syllogism: Mboga yote hukua kwenye miti angani. Nyanya zingine ni bluu na mraba katika sura. Ni ukweli kwamba saladi ni aina ya dessert. Hakuna matunda ambayo ni mboga. Kila nyanya moja ni mboga. Kwa hivyo, kuna nyanya ambazo sio matunda.
english_translated_syllogism: All vegetables grow on trees in the sky. Some tomatoes are blue and square in shape. It is a fact that salad is a type of dessert. No fruit is a vegetable. Every single tomato is a vegetable. So, there are tomatoes that are not fruits.

original_syllogism: Toutes les toiles sont faites de miel. Aucune abeille n'a jamais eu de dard. Il est vrai que tout ce qui est une abeille est un insecte. Chaque tarentule a des ailes et peut voler. Il existe des insectes qui sont des araignées. Il est suggéré que chaque araignée soit une abeille.
english_translated_syllogism: All webs are made of honey. No bee has ever had a sting. It is true that everything that is a bee is an insect. Each tarantula has wings and can fly. There are insects that are spiders. It is suggested that every spider is a bee.

original_syllogism: 事实是，所有总统都有天平。每个市长都是冷血蜥蜴。任何统治者实际上都是一条蛇。没有哪个政治家不是爬行动物。有些法官是两栖动物。国会议员中没有人是人类。凡是参议员就是政客。我们可以推断，有些参议员是爬行动物。
english_translated_syllogism: The truth is, all presidents have scales. Every mayor is a cold-blooded lizard. Any ruler is actually a snake. There is no politician who is not a reptile. Some judges are amphibians. No one in Congress is human. All senators are politicians. We can infer that some senators are reptilian.

original_syllogism: প্রত্যেক একক প্রকৌশলী একজন চাকরি সহ একজন ব্যক্তি।যেকোনো ডাক্তারই একজন ডিগ্রিধারী ব্যক্তি।যে কেউ একজন আইনজীবী হলেন একজন ডিগ্রিধারী ব্যক্তি।ডিগ্রিধারী কয়েকজন নার্স আছেন।কিছু পেশাদারের ডিগ্রি আছে।এটা সত্য যে সব শিক্ষকের চাকরি আছে।প্রত্যেক ব্যক্তি যার চাকরি আছে সেও একজন ডিগ্রিধারী।এটি এই উপসংহারের দিকে নিয়ে যায় যে এমন লোক রয়েছে যাদের চাকরি আছে যারা আইনজীবী নন।
english_translated_syllogism: Every single engineer is a person with a job. Every doctor is a person with a degree. Anyone who is a lawyer is a person with a degree. There are a few nurses with degrees. Some professionals have degrees. It is true that all teachers have jobs.

original_syllogism: No hay hojas que sean materia orgánica. Cualquier objeto que sea una rosa también es una flor. Cada árbol es un trozo de plástico. Algunas flores están hechas de piedra. No hay planta que sea una rosa. Esto significa que ninguna planta es una flor.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no leaves that are organic matter. Any object that is a rose is also a flower. Each tree is a piece of plastic. Some flowers are made of stone. There is no plant that is a rose. This means that no plant is a flower.

original_syllogism: Certains éléphants ne sont pas des animaux. Il n’existe pas de singes qui soient des créatures. Chaque tigre est un minéral. Tout lion est une plante. Il est vrai que tous les ours sont des fantômes. Un mammifère n'est jamais un type d'animal. Chaque girafe est un mammifère. Ainsi, la girafe n’est pas un animal.
english_translated_syllogism: Some elephants are not animals. There are no monkeys that are creatures. Each tiger is a mineral. Every lion is a plant. It is true that all bears are ghosts. A mammal is never a type of animal. Every giraffe is a mammal. So, the giraffe is not an animal.

original_syllogism: Абсолютно никакой кот не является собакой. Каждое животное имеет отличительные черты. Это правда, что существуют разные породы. Все домашние животные требуют любви и заботы. Некоторые виды территориальны по своей природе. Каждая собака — это тип млекопитающего. Следовательно, некоторые млекопитающие не являются кошками.
english_translated_syllogism: Absolutely no cat is a dog. Each animal has distinctive features. It is true that there are different breeds. All pets require love and care. Some species are territorial in nature. Every dog ​​is a type of mammal. Therefore, some mammals are not cats.

original_syllogism: Chaque chêne est un arbre. On sait que le bois est utilisé pour la construction. Toutes les forêts contribuent à l'approvisionnement en oxygène de la planète. Il existe de nombreux types d’arbres dans la nature. Chaque plante a besoin d’eau et de lumière pour survivre. Tous les chênes sont des plantes qui portent des glands. Il est donc vrai que certaines plantes à glands sont des arbres.
english_translated_syllogism: Every oak is a tree. We know that wood is used for construction. All forests contribute to the planet's oxygen supply. There are many types of trees in nature. Every plant needs water and light to survive. All oaks are acorn-bearing plants. It is therefore true that some acorn plants are trees.

original_syllogism: Ni kesi kwamba hakuna vyakula ni sehemu za mmea. Vyakula vingine huchimbwa kutoka katikati ya dunia. Karoti zote zinajulikana kuwa zenye sumu sana. Hakuna mwanadamu mmoja anayekula kuishi. Chochote ambacho ni mboga ni sehemu ya mmea unaofaa. Mboga sio vyakula.
english_translated_syllogism: It is the case that no foods are plant parts. Some foods are mined from the center of the earth. All carrots are known to be very poisonous. No human being eats to live. Anything that is a vegetable is part of a proper plant. Vegetables are not foods.

original_syllogism: Chaque voyageur a besoin d'un passeport. Tous les continents comptent de nombreux pays. Un certain nombre d'Européens sont allemands. La plupart des villes disposent de transports en commun. Certaines personnes parlent plusieurs langues. Il est vrai que l’histoire façonne les frontières. Parmi tous les Berlinois, une partie est allemande. Il est vrai que certains Berlinois sont européens.
english_translated_syllogism: Every traveler needs a passport. All continents have many countries. A number of Europeans are German. Most cities have public transportation. Some people speak several languages. It is true that history shapes borders. Among all Berliners, some are German. It is true that some Berliners are European.

original_syllogism: Bustani nyingi zina blooms za kupendeza. Kila mti mmoja sio rose. Mimea mingine inakua mrefu sana. Kila mbegu inahitaji udongo kuchipua. Sehemu ya maua ni maua. Ni kesi kwamba sio maua yote ni miti.
english_translated_syllogism: Many gardens have beautiful blooms. Every single tree is not a rose. Some plants grow very tall. Every seed needs soil to germinate. The flower part is the flower. It is the case that not all flowers are trees.

original_syllogism: Ogni studente porta il materiale a scuola. È vero che il piombo è una forma di grafite. Ci sono gomme attaccate all'estremità delle matite. Tutti gli artisti utilizzano vari strumenti per creare schizzi. Alcuni strumenti da scrittura sono realizzati in plastica. Non esistono matite che non siano strumenti di scrittura. Non esistono matite che non siano oggetti con mina. Pertanto alcuni oggetti contenenti piombo sono strumenti di scrittura.
english_translated_syllogism: Each student brings materials to school. It is true that lead is a form of graphite. There are erasers attached to the ends of the pencils. All artists use various tools to create sketches. Some writing instruments are made of plastic. There are no pencils that are not writing instruments. There are no pencils that are not objects with leads. Therefore some objects containing lead are writing instruments.

original_syllogism: এই গ্রহে কোনো প্রাণীর বসবাস নেই।যে কোনো কিছু এবং সবকিছুই একটি প্রাণী।সব মানুষই বৃহস্পতি গ্রহে জন্মেছে।এটা সত্য যে পৃথিবী প্যানকেকের মতো সমতল।কিছু মানুষের সবুজ ত্বক এবং তিনটি চোখ থাকে।প্রতিটি প্রাণী একটি মহাকাশযান চালায়।এমন প্রাণী আছে যারা মানুষ।এটা মেনে চলতে হবে যে সব মানুষই এলিয়েন।
english_translated_syllogism: No animals live on this planet. Anything and everything is an animal. All humans are born on Jupiter. It is true that the earth is flat like a pancake. Some humans have green skin and three eyes. Every animal drives a spaceship. There are animals that are humans.

original_syllogism: Todo lo que es un número es un concepto. Algunas ecuaciones son animales. Es un hecho que todas las ideas están hechas de madera. Cada letra es un vegetal. El número tres no es un concepto. De esto se deduce que tres no es un número.
english_translated_syllogism: Everything that is a number is a concept. Some equations are animals. It is a fact that all ideas are made of wood. Each letter is a vegetable. The number three is not a concept. From this it follows that three is not a number.

original_syllogism: 每一辆公共汽车都是一辆汽车。确实，所有货车都是车辆。任何卡车都是车辆。有一些车辆不是汽车。每辆汽车都是交通工具。有一些汽车是汽车。由此可见，每辆车都是一辆车。
english_translated_syllogism: Every bus is a car. Indeed, all trucks are vehicles. Any truck is a vehicle. There are some vehicles that are not cars. Every car is a means of transportation. There are some cars that are cars. It follows that every car is a car.

original_syllogism: Не существует китов, являющихся насекомыми. Каждый муравей – насекомое. Некоторые животные являются млекопитающими. Это правда, что все, что является собакой, также является млекопитающим. Любая кошка – млекопитающее. Ни одно млекопитающие не являются насекомыми. На этом основании можно сделать вывод, что некоторые насекомые не являются собаками.
english_translated_syllogism: There are no whales that are insects. Every ant is an insect. Some animals are mammals. It is true that everything that is a dog is also a mammal. Any cat is a mammal. No mammals are insects. On this basis, we can conclude that some insects are not dogs.

original_syllogism: Non una sola cosa che sia un vertebrato è un mammifero. Alcuni animali depongono le uova in gelatina. Ogni ecosistema ha una catena alimentare. È vero che la pelle può essere permeabile. È un dato di fatto che ogni singola rana è un vertebrato. Deve essere vero che nessuna rana è un mammifero.
english_translated_syllogism: Not a single thing that is a vertebrate is a mammal. Some animals lay jelly eggs. Every ecosystem has a food chain. It's true that skin can be permeable. It is a fact that every single frog is a vertebrate. It must be true that no frog is a mammal.

original_syllogism: Elke kat leeft onder water. Ieder zoogdier is een vis. Elke hond heeft kieuwen. Het is waar dat alle leeuwen vinnen hebben. Het is waar dat sommige beren zoogdieren zijn. Daarom zijn alle beren vissen.
english_translated_syllogism: Every cat lives underwater. Every mammal is a fish. Every dog ​​has gills. It is true that all lions have fins. It is true that some bears are mammals. That's why all bears are fish.

original_syllogism: প্রতিটি পাখি উড়তে পারে এমন একটি জিনিস।কিছু ডোডো এমন পাখি যারা উড়তে পারে।প্রতিটি কিউই পাখি আকাশে উড়ে যায়।এটা সত্য যে সমস্ত ইমু উড়তে সক্ষম।উড়তে পারে না এমন কোন ক্যাসোওয়ারী নেই।পেঙ্গুইন যে কোন জিনিসই পাখি।অন্তত একটি পেঙ্গুইন আছে যা উড়তে সক্ষম।
english_translated_syllogism: Every bird is a thing that can fly. Some dodo is a bird that can fly. Every kiwi bird flies in the sky. It is true that all emu can fly. There is no cassowary that cannot fly. Penguins are all birds. There is at least one penguin that can fly.

original_syllogism: ప్రతి ఒక్క తోకచుక్క ఒక నక్షత్రం చుట్టూ తిరుగుతుంది. ప్రతి ఒక్క గ్రహం ఒక ఖగోళ శరీరం. అన్ని గెలాక్సీలలో నక్షత్రాలు ఉంటాయనేది నిజం. కొన్ని గ్రహశకలాలు ఖగోళ వస్తువులు. నక్షత్రం అనే ఒక్క ఖగోళ శరీరం కూడా లేదు. ఏ నక్షత్రం గ్రహం కాదనేది నిజం కావాలి.
english_translated_syllogism: Each comet revolves around a star. Each planet is a celestial body. It is true that all galaxies contain stars. Some asteroids are celestial bodies. There is not a single celestial body called a star. It must be true that no star is a planet.

original_syllogism: Muitas galerias exibem belas obras de arte. É verdade que a criatividade assume muitas formas. Entre aqueles que são pessoas criativas, alguns são pintores. Algumas pessoas gostam de visitar museus nos fins de semana. Todos aqueles que são pintores são artistas. Portanto, deve ser verdade que alguns artistas são pessoas criativas.
english_translated_syllogism: Many galleries display beautiful works of art. It's true that creativity takes many forms. Among those who are creative people, some are painters. Some people like to visit museums on weekends. All those who are painters are artists. So it must be true that some artists are creative people.

original_syllogism: Qualcuno che è un uomo non sposato è una persona. Ogni società ha usanze diverse riguardo alla famiglia. È vero che il matrimonio è un contratto legale. Molti uomini scelgono di rimanere single per la loro carriera. Ogni singolo scapolo è una persona. Ne consegue che tutti gli scapoli sono uomini non sposati.
english_translated_syllogism: Someone who is an unmarried man is a person. Every society has different customs regarding the family. It is true that marriage is a legal contract. Many men choose to remain single for their careers. Every single bachelor is a person. It follows that all bachelors are unmarried men.

original_syllogism: সব বাগান সবুজে ভরপুর।প্রতিটি বীজের বৃদ্ধির সম্ভাবনা রয়েছে।ফুল যা সবই উদ্ভিদ।অনেক ধরনের মাটি জন্মানোর জন্য ভালো।গাছপালা সব বস্তুই আসলে গোলাপ।তাই সব গোলাপই ফুল।
english_translated_syllogism: All gardens are full of greenery. Every seed has the potential to grow. Flowers are all plants. Many types of soil are good for growing. All plants are actually roses. So all roses are flowers.

original_syllogism: Alle Ozeane sind mit Betonstraßen gepflastert. Jeder einzelne Fisch lebt in einem Baumhaus. Kein Fluss fließt bergab;sie fließen alle nach oben. Alles, was als Fluss klassifiziert ist, ist ein Gebäude. Alles, was als Fluss klassifiziert ist, besteht aus Papier. Daher ist mindestens ein Ding aus Papier ein Gebäude.
english_translated_syllogism: All oceans are paved with concrete roads. Every single fish lives in a tree house. No river flows downhill; they all flow up. Anything classified as a river is a building. Anything classified as a river is made of paper. Therefore, at least one thing made of paper is a building.

original_syllogism: সমস্ত মহাসাগরে বিশাল ইকোসিস্টেম রয়েছে।কিছু প্রাণী ভূমি এবং জল উভয় জায়গায় বাস করতে পারে।কোনো একক জলজ প্রাণী নেই যেটি একটি স্থল প্রাণী।এটা সত্য যে জীববিজ্ঞান প্রজাতির শ্রেণীবিভাগ করে।প্রতিটি সামুদ্রিক প্রাণী তার পরিবেশের সাথে খাপ খাইয়ে নেয়।কোন মাছ জলজ প্রাণী নয়।তাই এটা সত্য যে কিছু মাছ স্থল প্রাণী নয়।
english_translated_syllogism: All oceans have vast ecosystems. Some animals can live on both land and water. There is no single aquatic animal that is a land animal. It is true that biology classifies species. Every marine animal adapts to its environment. No fish is an aquatic animal. So it is true that some fish are not land animals.

original_syllogism: 没有任何海洋动物生活在咸水中。没有一只鲸鱼是哺乳动物。事实上，所有哺乳动物都会产下由纯金制成的蛋。所有的海洋都是由苏打水组成的。每条鱼都在天上飞，而不是游泳。每头座头鲸都是鲸鱼。因此，有些座头鲸不是哺乳动物。
english_translated_syllogism: No marine animals live in salt water. No whale is a mammal. Virtually all mammals lay eggs made of pure gold. All oceans are made of soda water. Every fish flies in the sky instead of swimming. Every humpback is a whale. Therefore, some humpback whales are not mammals.

original_syllogism: 没有四个轮胎就不存在任何物体。一些云在高速公路上行驶。每辆车都是一辆车。树木有发动机，这是事实。所有苹果都是机动车辆。每一块岩石都有一个方向盘。所有车辆都是物体。因此，我们可以得出结论，每个物体都是一辆汽车。
english_translated_syllogism: There is no object without four tires. Some clouds are driving on the highway. Every car is a car. Trees have engines, that's a fact. All apples are motor vehicles. Every rock has a steering wheel. All vehicles are objects. Therefore, we can conclude that every object is a car.

original_syllogism: Muchos artistas disfrutan expresándose creativamente. Todo músico requiere práctica para dominar su oficio. Todas las sinfonías suelen ser interpretadas por orquestas. Es cierto que ningún pintor es compositor de sinfonías. Hay pintores famosos que vivieron en el siglo XIX. Algunas personas aprecian tanto la música como el arte visual. Todo aquel que es compositor es un compositor de sinfonías. La implicación es que una parte de los compositores no son pintores.
english_translated_syllogism: Many artists enjoy expressing themselves creatively. Every musician requires practice to master their craft. All symphonies are usually performed by orchestras. It is true that no painter is a composer of symphonies. There are famous painters who lived in the 19th century. Some people appreciate both music and visual art. Everyone who is a composer is a composer of symphonies. The implication is that some composers are not painters.

original_syllogism: Tous les lézards aiment se prélasser au soleil. La plupart des grenouilles pondent leurs œufs dans l'eau. Aucun animal reptile n’est un amphibien. Il est vrai que la classification biologique est complexe. Parmi les reptiles, on trouve quelques serpents. Il doit être vrai que certains serpents ne sont pas des amphibiens.
english_translated_syllogism: All lizards like to bask in the sun. Most frogs lay their eggs in water. No reptile animal is an amphibian. It is true that biological classification is complex. Among the reptiles, we find some snakes. It must be true that some snakes are not amphibians.

original_syllogism: Es ist eine Tatsache, dass es keine Zahlen gibt. Es wurde noch nie eine Form gezeichnet. Jedes Quadrat ist rund wie eine Kugel. Es stimmt nicht, dass jedes Achteck ein Kreis ist. Alle Dreiecke haben zehn Seiten. Es gibt einige Kreise, die auch Objekte mit acht Seiten sind. Es gibt Objekte mit acht Seiten, die keine Achtecke sind.
english_translated_syllogism: It is a fact that there are no numbers. No shape has ever been drawn. Each square is round like a ball. It is not true that every octagon is a circle. All triangles have ten sides. There are some circles that are also objects with eight sides. There are objects with eight sides that are not octagons.

original_syllogism: Es ist eine bekannte Tatsache, dass die Schwerkraft Dinge nach oben drückt. Alle Hunde sind in der Lage, über den Mond zu fliegen. Es gibt keine Vögel, die Federn am Körper haben. Nicht ein einziger Vogel ist ein Tier. Manche Wolken bestehen tatsächlich aus fester Zuckerwatte. Jeder einzelne Vogel kann fliegen. Dadurch können alle Tiere fliegen.
english_translated_syllogism: It's a well-known fact that gravity pushes things up. All dogs are able to fly over the moon. There are no birds that have feathers on their bodies. Not a single bird is an animal. Some clouds are actually made of solid cotton candy. Every single bird can fly. This means that all animals can fly.

original_syllogism: Kila mbwa mmoja ni mamalia. Kila mamalia hupumua hewa ndani ya mapafu yao. Ni ukweli kwamba dolphins ni viumbe wenye akili. Kuna spishi nyingi za maisha ya baharini. Nyangumi wote ni viumbe ambavyo husogelea baharini. Samaki wengine wana mizani inayofunika miili yao. Hakuna mbwa ambao ni samaki. Kwa hivyo, hakuna samaki ambao ni mamalia.
english_translated_syllogism: Every single dog is a mammal. All mammals breathe air into their lungs. It is a fact that dolphins are intelligent creatures. There are many species of marine life. All whales are creatures that swim in the sea. Some fish have scales that cover their bodies. No dog is a fish. Therefore, no fish are mammals.

original_syllogism: Это факт, что все отвертки жидкие. Некоторые гаечные ключи сделаны из соды. Все, что является карандашом, является объектом. Каждый молоток сделан из воды. Некоторые инструменты — карандаши. Следовательно, каждый инструмент сделан из жидкости.
english_translated_syllogism: It is a fact that all screwdrivers are liquid. Some wrenches are made from soda. Anything that is a pencil is an object. Each hammer is made of water. Some tools are pencils. Therefore, every instrument is made of liquid.

original_syllogism: Iedere natuurkundige heeft kennis van zaken. Sommige mensen met kennis zijn leraren. Elke bioloog is een wetenschapper. Iedere onderzoeker beschikt over kennis. Er zijn een paar wetenschappers die professor zijn. Sommige wetenschappers zijn onderzoekers. Geconcludeerd moet worden dat alle wetenschappers kennis hebben.
english_translated_syllogism: Every physicist has expertise. Some people with knowledge are teachers. Every biologist is a scientist. Every researcher has knowledge. There are a few scientists who are professors. Some scientists are researchers. It must be concluded that all scientists have knowledge.

original_syllogism: 每件椅子都是一件家具。确实，所有沙发都是家具。没有铅笔是家具。每一张桌子都是一件家具。有些杂志不是家具。没有一本书是家具。有些书不是椅子。
english_translated_syllogism: Every chair is a piece of furniture. Indeed, all sofas are furniture. No pencil is furniture. Every table is a piece of furniture. Some magazines are not furniture. No book is furniture. Some books are not chairs.

original_syllogism: Chiunque sia un fornaio è qualcuno che prepara il cibo. Alcuni camerieri sono persone che servono cibo. È vero che molte persone che preparano il cibo sono cuochi casalinghi. Alcuni cuochi sono persone che lavorano nei ristoranti. Ogni singola persona che è uno chef è un cuoco. Tutti i sous-chef sono persone che lavorano nelle cucine. Ogni cuoco è una persona che prepara il cibo. Ne consegue necessariamente che alcune delle persone che preparano il cibo sono chef.
english_translated_syllogism: Anyone who is a baker is someone who prepares food. Some waiters are people who serve food. It's true that many people who prepare food are home cooks. Some chefs are people who work in restaurants. Every single person who is a chef is a cook. All sous chefs are people who work in kitchens. Every chef is a person who prepares food. It necessarily follows that some of the people who prepare the food are chefs.
